items.summary_en: Key takeaways from Greg Brockman on building AI at scale, safety, governance, and the future of intelligence deployment, with reflections on engineering culture and long-term policy.
items.summary_zh: Greg Brockman 就大规模 AI 构建、安全、治理及未来 AI 部署等议题给出要点，分享了工程文化与长期政策的看法。

items.title_en: Deflock hits 100k ALPRs Mapped in USA
items.title_zh: Deflock 已将美国 ALPR 摄像头映射至 10 万处
items.summary_en: Deflock has mapped over 100k ALPR cameras in the U.S., creating a public-facing map of automated license plate readers. The project highlights surveillance scale and raises privacy concerns, while enabling policy analysis and research.
items.summary_zh: Deflock 已在美国映射超过 10 万处 ALPR 摄像头，发布公开地图。该工作揭示了监控网络的规模，同时引发隐私和治理方面的讨论。

items.title_en: On Rendering Diffs
items.title_zh: 渲染差异的要点
items.summary_en: Explores practical techniques for rendering diffs efficiently and readably in UIs or code reviews. It discusses how to structure diff output, minimize cognitive load, and avoid performance pitfalls when large changes occur.
items.summary_zh: 探讨在用户界面或代码评审中高效且易读地渲染差异的实用方法，涵盖如何组织差异输出、降低认知负担，以及在大规模变更时避免性能瓶颈。

items.title_en: Real-time LLM Inference on Standard GPUs: 3k tokens/s per request
items.title_zh: 在标准GPU上实现实时LLM推断：每请求3k token/秒
items.summary_en: A demonstration shows real-time LLM inference on commodity GPUs reaching about 3,000 tokens per second per request. It highlights optimization techniques like quantization and kernel efficiency that lower costs for large-scale deployments and edge-friendly AI services.
items.summary_zh: 展示表明在常规GPU上可实现接近每请求3,000 token/秒的实时LLM推断，强调量化、内核优化等方法降低大规模部署成本，并提升边缘AI服务的可行性。

items.title_en: Spanish court declines to fine NordVPN over LaLiga piracy blocking order
items.title_zh: 西班牙法院拒绝就 NordVPN 处以罚款
items.summary_en: A Spanish court refused to fine NordVPN for LaLiga piracy blocking orders, suggesting that the enforcement of blocking requests against VPNs remains legally nuanced. The decision affects how anti-piracy measures are applied to privacy-focused services and could influence future court rulings.
items.summary_zh: 西班牙法院裁定不对 NordVPN就LaLiga 阻止盗版的拦截令处以罚款，显示对 VPN 服务的取证与执行仍具法理上的复杂性。此判决或将影响将来对隐私保护服务的版权拦截措施及司法走向。

items.title_en: News about Raspberry Pi 6 and Microcontroller Development
items.title_zh: 关于 Raspberry Pi 6 与微控制器开发的消息
items.summary_en: Jeff Geerling weighs in on Raspberry Pi 6 and microcontroller development, highlighting anticipated features, ecosystem progress, and the impact on hobbyist and educational hardware projects.
items.summary_zh: Jeff Geerling 对 Raspberry Pi 6 与微控制器开发进行了点评，聚焦潜在新特性、生态系统进展，以及对爱好者和教育硬件项目的影响。

items.title_en: Chuwi Minibook X
items.title_zh: Chuwi Minibook X
items.summary_en: Chuwi's Minibook X continues the brand's budget-friendly ultrabook line with a compact footprint and entry-level specs. It highlights ongoing demand for portable, affordable laptops in budget-conscious markets and the trade-offs between price, battery life, and performance.
items.summary_zh: Chuwi Minibook X 延续了品牌的经济型超极本路线，体积紧凑、配置入门。它体现了在预算友好市场对便携笔记本的持续需求，以及价格、续航和性能之间的权衡。

items.title_en: AWS Fired the One Employee Who Gave a Damn
items.title_zh: AWS 解雇了那个真正愿意为改进付出努力的员工
items.summary_en: An exposé claims AWS fired the one employee who made a difference. The piece raises questions about how large cloud providers treat internal advocates and the potential impact on product quality and team morale.
items.summary_zh: 据称 AWS 解雇了那位真正推动变革的员工。这一事件引发对大型云服务商如何对待内部倡导者，以及对产品质量与团队士气的潜在影响的质疑。

items.title_en: IXI's autofocusing lenses are almost ready to replace multifocal glasses
items.title_zh: IXIS 自动对焦镜片几乎可替代多焦点眼镜
items.summary_en: IXIS autofocusing lenses are nearing readiness to replace multifocal glasses, potentially disrupting the eyewear market and simplifying presbyopia correction for many users. If commercialized, the tech could shift how consumers manage focus across distance and near tasks.
items.summary_zh: IXIS 自动对焦镜片接近量产，可能取代多焦点眼镜，进而冲击眼镜市场并简化白内障前后年花眼矫正。若正式上市，用户在远近焦点切换的日常使用将更为便捷。

items.title_en: Meta launches Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp subscriptions
items.title_zh: Meta 推出 Instagram、Facebook 与 WhatsApp 订阅服务
items.summary_en: Meta officially rolls out paid subscriptions across its main apps, signaling a shift toward creator monetization and premium experiences. Coupled with forthcoming AI features, the move hints at how social platforms may balance revenue, user value, and data use going forward.
items.summary_zh: Meta 正式在旗下应用推出付费订阅，标志着向创作者变现和更高端体验的转型。再加上未来的 AI 功能，这一举措暗示了社交平台在未来如何平衡收入、用户价值与数据使用。

items.title_en: Yoti age checks share facial photos and device fingerprints with third parties
items.title_zh: Yoti 年龄验证共享人脸照片与设备指纹
items.summary_en: Yoti's age-verification service reportedly shares facial photos and device fingerprints with third parties, raising concerns about biometric privacy and consent in online verification. The episode underscores the privacy risks embedded in identity tools used by many apps.
items.summary_zh: 报道指出 Yoti 的年龄验证服务将人脸照片与设备指纹等生物识别数据与第三方共享，引发对在线身份验证中的生物识别隐私和同意问题的担忧。这凸显了多数应用使用的身份工具所固有的隐私风险。

items.title_en: Show HN: Tiny-vLLM – high performance LLM inference engine in C++ and CUDA
items.title_zh: Show HN：Tiny-vLLM——用 C++ 与 CUDA 实现高性能 LLM 推理引擎
items.summary_en: Tiny-vLLM presents a compact, high-performance LLM inference engine built in C++ and CUDA, offering a lightweight alternative to heavyweight frameworks. Its design focuses on speed, lower memory footprint, and easier integration into custom apps.
items.summary_zh: Tiny-vLLM 提供一个用 C++ 与 CUDA 构建的紧凑高性能 LLM 推理引擎，是对重量级框架的轻量替代方案，强调速度、较小的内存占用以及更易于在自定义应用中集成。

items.title_en: Stop Advertising in Your Commits
items.title_zh: 不要在提交中打广告
items.summary_en: Advocates keeping commits clean of promotional content, stressing reproducibility and auditability. The post suggests practical practices like lean commit messages, separating marketing from code changes, and keeping promos out of the history.
items.summary_zh: 强调提交记录应干净，不夹带广告内容，关注可重复性与审计性。给出实践建议，如使用简洁的提交信息、将营销内容与代码改动分离、避免在历史中出现推广信息。

items.title_en: 'Backrooms' Stuns with $81M Debut
items.title_zh: Backrooms：8100万美元首映震撼票房
items.summary_en: Backrooms delivers a standout $81M opening weekend, signaling strong audience appetite for high-energy genre cinema. The debut demonstrates the viability of niche concepts breaking through to broad audiences in a competitive market.
items.summary_zh: Backrooms 以8100万美元的首映周末票房取得瞩目成绩，显示观众对高能量类型片的强烈需求。此首映表明小众题材也能在竞争激烈的市场中打入主流观众。

items.title_en: Hormuz crisis side effect: a sharp rise in container shipping rates
items.title_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡危机副作用：集装箱运价显著上升
items.summary_en: Geopolitical tensions around the Strait of Hormuz have led to a sharp rise in container shipping rates, as insurers and carriers hedge risk. The cost spike exacerbates supply-chain inflation and could slow the delivery of electronics and other goods, with knock-on effects for consumer prices. Shippers are likely to reroute and adjust schedules to mitigate risk.
items.summary_zh: 承运商可能通过改道和调整航线来缓解压力。

items.title_en: Ten Basic Clouds
items.title_zh: 十种基本云
items.summary_en: A concise primer listing the ten fundamental cloud types, with identifying features and what they signal about the weather. Even for tech readers, understanding cloud formation helps contextualize forecasts, climate patterns, and data collection environments.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个简短的云分类入门，列出十种基本云的特征及其天气信号。了解云的形成有助于把握天气走向、气候模式，以及对观测数据的解释。

items.title_en: Shift will clean homes for free to train future robots
items.title_zh: Shift 将免费清洁房屋以换取未来机器人训练数据
items.summary_en: Shift plans to offer free house cleaning in exchange for data to train future robots, raising questions about privacy, consent, and the value of data. This model reflects a broader trend of data-for-service deals shaping AI and robotics development.
items.summary_zh: Shift 将提供免费家居清洁服务来换取用于训练未来机器人的数据，引发关于隐私、同意和数据价值的讨论。这一模式反映了以数据换取服务来推动 AI 与机器人发展的更广泛趋势。

items.title_en: High Density Living, 2000 Years Ago: Inside the Roman Apartment Building
items.title_zh: 两千年前的高密度生活：罗马公寓建筑内幕
items.summary_en: A look at Roman apartment living reveals how ancient cities supported dense populations through shared infrastructure and multi-family layouts. The piece offers timeless lessons for modern urbanism and housing design in terms of space efficiency and communal amenities.
items.summary_zh: 对罗马公寓生活的观察揭示了古城如何通过公共基础设施和多家庭布局来支撑高密度人口。文章为现代城市规划与住房设计提供了关于空间利用和公共设施的历史经验。

items.title_en: Stack Overflow’s forum is dead but the company’s still kicking
items.title_zh: Stack Overflow 的论坛已死，但公司仍在成长
items.summary_en: Public forum activity on Stack Overflow has waned, partly due to AI copilots, yet the company continues to evolve with enterprise offerings and platform expansions.
items.summary_zh: Stack Overflow 的公开论坛活跃度下降，部分原因是 AI 助手的兴起，但公司仍在通过企业产品与平台扩展发展。文章探讨社区文化与商业化/AI 集成之间的张力。

items.title_en: Building Pi with Pi
items.title_zh: 用 Pi 构建 Pi
items.summary_en: It highlights the challenges and rewards of using a project’s own tooling to build its ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: 文章展示了用 Pi 自行构建 Pi 的自举过程，说明了自托管开发的技术要点与挑战，以及让项目自研工具链自成生态的潜在收益。

items.title_en: Show HN: TV Explorer. Adding advanced UI to free online TV
items.title_zh: Show HN：TV Explorer——为免费在线电视构建高级用户界面
items.summary_en: Show HN project TV Explorer adds an advanced UI layer to free online television, improving navigation, search, and viewing workflows. It showcases how a thoughtful UI can transform accessible media into a more engaging experience.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 项目 TV Explorer 为免费在线电视增添了高级用户界面，改善导航、搜索与观看工作流，展示了用心的 UI 如何将可访问的媒体变得更加引人入胜。

items.title_en: White Rabbit – sub-nanosecond synchronization for large distributed systems
items.title_zh: White Rabbit：大规模分布式系统的亚纳秒级同步
items.summary_en: White Rabbit is a precision time protocol extension that combines Synchronous Ethernet, PTP, and custom hardware to achieve sub-nanosecond synchronization across large networks. It enables deterministic timing for experiments and data centers, and demonstrates how specialized hardware-assisted timing outperforms standard clock synchronization.
items.summary_zh: White Rabbit 是一种将同步以太网、PTP与自研硬件结合的高精度时钟协议扩展，能够实现亚纳秒级的全网同步。它被用于需要确定性时序的大规模分布式系统和科研场景，显著优于常规的NTP/PTP 方案。

items.title_en: We should be more tired than the model
items.title_zh: 我们应该比模型更累
items.summary_en: Argues that human judgment and scrutiny should accompany AI systems, highlighting fatigue, error costs, and the importance of keeping human oversight in the loop.
items.summary_zh: 主张人类判断与审慎应与AI系统并行，强调疲劳、错误成本，以及让人类保持监督在环的重要性。

items.title_en: Rosalind: A genomics toolkit in Rust running whole-genome pipelines on a laptop
items.title_zh: Rosalind：用 Rust 编写的基因组学工具包，可在笔记本电脑上运行全基因组管线
items.summary_en: Rosalind is a genomics toolkit written in Rust that runs whole-genome pipelines on a laptop. It demonstrates how Rust's performance and safety can empower researchers to carry out end-to-end analyses locally, reducing reliance on cloud or clusters. This portability could lower barriers for small labs and field work.
items.summary_zh: Rosalind 是用 Rust 编写的基因组学工具包，可以在笔记本电脑上运行完整的全基因组管线。其展示了 Rust 的高性能与内存安全如何让研究者在本地完成一整套分析，减少对云端或计算集群的依赖。这种便携性有望降低小型实验室的门槛并支持现场工作。

items.title_en: Usborne 1980s Computer Books
items.title_zh: Usborne 1980 年代的计算机书籍
items.summary_en: Usborne's 1980s computer and coding books helped a generation learn BASIC and early computing through approachable projects. The collection highlights how beginner-friendly guides shaped digital literacy and left a lasting cultural footprint.
items.summary_zh: Usborne 的 1980 年代计算机与编码书籍通过易学的项目引导一代人学习 BASIC 和早期计算机知识。该系列展示了面向初学者的讲解如何塑造数字素养，并留下持久的文化印记。

items.title_en: Mechanical Pencil: An illustrated celebration of the engineering around us
items.title_zh: 机械铅笔：对周围工程的插画庆典
items.summary_en: Mechanical Pencil is a visually rich site celebrating the engineering around us through illustrations. It highlights a range of everyday innovations, offering readers a design-minded look at how things work. The result is a creative reminder of engineering artistry that complements technical interests.
items.summary_zh: 机械铅笔是一个以插画方式庆祝我们周围工程的视觉作品集。 它聚焦日常创新，提供设计导向的视角来理解事物的工作原理。 这是一份将工程之美以艺术化方式呈现、与技术兴趣相得益彰的资源。

items.title_en: Coalton is an efficient, statically typed Lisp with ideas from Haskell and OCaml
items.title_zh: Coalton：受 Haskell/OCaml 启发的高效静态类型 Lisp
items.summary_en: Coalton presents a Lisp dialect with a static type system, borrowing ideas from Haskell and OCaml to improve safety and performance. The project explores blending Lisp's flexibility with strong typing to enable robust macro-rich development.
items.summary_zh: Coalton 以静态类型的 Lisp 派生语言为目标，借鉴 Haskell 与 OCaml 的理念来提升类型安全和性能。其设计在于在保持 Lisp 灵活性的同时，为宏系统和大型代码库提供更强的可靠性。

items.title_en: Backpressure is all you need
items.title_zh: 回压才是王道
items.summary_en: Backpressure is all you need argues that backpressure is the essential principle for building robust streaming systems, preventing memory pressure spikes and cascading failures.
items.summary_zh: 回压才是王道 主张回压是构建健壮流式系统的关键原则，能防止内存压力激增和级联故障。文中给出跨语言的实现模式与实用示例，帮助工程师在生产中落地回压。

items.title_en: Microsoft pulls plug on plans for 244-acre data center in Caledonia (2025)
items.title_zh: 微软取消在 Caledonia 的 244 英亩数据中心计划（2025）
items.summary_en: Microsoft cancels its 244-acre data center project in Caledonia in 2025 after community pushback, highlighting the friction between big-tech expansion and local concerns. The reversal shows how local opposition and regulatory scrutiny can derail or delay capital-intensive infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 微软取消在 Caledonia 的 244 英亩数据中心计划（2025），凸显大型科技扩张与地方关切之间的矛盾。地方反对声音与监管审查可能迫使这类高资本密集型基础设施的推迟或取消。

items.title_en: 'AI washing': firms are scrambling to rebrand themselves as tech-focused
items.title_zh: AI 洗白：公司匆忙将自己包装成科技型
items.summary_en: Firms are engaging in 'AI washing' by marketing themselves as AI-first even if their core products aren’t AI-centric. The piece analyzes PR tactics, potential investor skepticism, and what to look for beyond buzzwords.
items.summary_zh: 公司通过炒作 AI 能力来包装自己，哪怕核心产品并非 AI 驱动的也自称 AI 为先。文章分析公关手法、投资者可能的怀疑，以及读者应关注的真实能力与产品路线。

items.title_en: Defeating Git Rigour Fatigue with Jujutsu
items.title_zh: 以柔术化解 Git 的严格流程疲劳
items.summary_en: A pragmatic take argues against rigid Git workflows that burn out teams, offering lightweight, jujutsu-inspired practices to reduce cognitive load. Expect tips like smaller pull requests, incremental changes, and flexible branching to maintain momentum.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为对 Git 的过度严格流程会让团队疲惫，主张用“柔术式”的简化方法降低认知负荷。给出可操作的建议，如缩短提交范围、分支策略更灵活、逐步变更以保持开发势头。

items.title_en: Build Adafruit projects right from Firefox
items.title_zh: Firefox 让 Adafruit 项目直接在浏览器构建
items.summary_en: Firefox now enables building and interacting with Adafruit hardware projects directly from the browser, leveraging in-browser USB/Serial capabilities. This reduces setup friction for makers and demonstrates growing hardware-tethered experiences in the browser.
items.summary_zh: Firefox 现在支持直接在浏览器中构建并与 Adafruit 硬件项目互动，利用浏览器内的 USB/串口能力。为开发者和创客降低了上手难度，展现出浏览器在硬件协作方面日益成熟的趋势。

items.title_en: Corporate America Is Starting to Ration AI as Cost Skyrockets
items.title_zh: 企业界开始对 AI 实施配额，成本飙升
items.summary_en: Corporate America is trimming AI usage as runaway costs bite. Firms are imposing quotas, consolidating vendors, and prioritizing high-impact use cases to control spend while still pursuing productivity gains. The trend highlights the tension between AI's promised efficiency and its real-world operating costs.
items.summary_zh: 此举反映了 AI 提效潜力与实际运营成本之间的矛盾，以及企业在预算压力下的治理与采用节奏。

items.title_en: Dynamic Workflows in Claude Code
items.title_zh: Claude Code 的动态工作流
items.summary_en: Claude Code gets dynamic workflows, enabling multi-step, conditional code execution within the AI coding assistant. This enables more complex automation, better orchestration of tasks, and could raise developer productivity and reliability of AI-generated code.
items.summary_zh: Claude Code 引入动态工作流，允许在 AI 编码助手中执行多步、条件化的代码流程。此特性提升了任务编排的灵活性与自动化深度，可能提高开发效率并提升 AI 代码的可靠性。

items.title_en: CBP Directive 3340-049B: Border Search of Electronic Devices
items.title_zh: CBP 指令 3340-049B：边境对电子设备的搜查
items.summary_en: CBP's directive clarifies border search authority for electronic devices, outlining procedures, privacy considerations, and data handling. The guidance informs travelers and developers about what can be inspected and how data is stored or used.
items.summary_zh: CBP 的指令明确了边境对电子设备搜查的权限与程序，涵盖隐私考量与数据处理。为旅行者和开发者提供了对可检查内容以及数据存储与使用方式的指引。

items.title_en: A Gentle Introduction to Lattice-Based Cryptography [pdf]
items.title_zh: 格基密码学入门（PDF）
items.summary_en: This gentle introduction offers an accessible tour of lattice-based cryptography, outlining why hard lattice problems underpin quantum-resistant security. It covers core constructs like LWE and SIS in practical terms and discusses how these ideas translate into real-world cryptosystems.
items.summary_zh: 本文以通俗方式介绍格基密码学的核心概念，解释为何格的困难问题构成量子安全性的基石。聚焦 LWE、SIS 等关键构造及其在实际密码系统中的应用要点，便于读者把握该领域的要点。

items.title_en: ChatGPT for Google Sheets exfiltrates workbooks
items.title_zh: Google 表格的 ChatGPT 插件可能外泄工作簿数据
items.summary_en: Running ChatGPT inside Google Sheets can inadvertently expose workbook content to the model, creating data leakage risks. This demonstrates how AI copilots can unintentionally exfiltrate sensitive data via prompts and interactions. It underscores the need for strict data governance and prompt-design safeguards when embedding AI in productivity tools.
items.summary_zh: 在 Google 表格中运行 ChatGPT 可能无意间将工作簿内容暴露给模型，带来数据外泄风险。这揭示了 AI 辅助工具在提示与交互中可能无意地外带敏感数据。强调在把 AI 嵌入生产力工具时，需加强数据治理与提示设计的防护。

items.title_en: CVE-2026-28952: Apple macOS 26.5 Kernel Vuln found by Claude
items.title_zh: CVE-2026-28952：Apple macOS 26.5 内核漏洞
items.summary_en: CVE-2026-28952 affects macOS 26.5 kernel; Apple issues a security advisory with mitigations and patch timelines. Users are urged to update to secure builds.
items.summary_zh: CVE-2026-28952 影响 macOS 26.5 内核，苹果发布安全公告给出缓解办法与修补时间表，建议尽快更新以确保系统安全。

items.title_en: Stress disrupts hippocampal integration of overlapping events, memory inference
items.title_zh: 压力与记忆：海马体在重叠事件中的整合受干扰
items.summary_en: New study shows that stress disrupts the hippocampus integrates overlapping events, impairing memory inference. The findings illuminate neural pathways behind stress-related memory changes and could inform treatments for anxiety-related cognitive effects.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现，压力会扰乱海马体对重叠事件的整合，削弱推断性记忆。结果揭示了压力对记忆的神经机制，或有助于理解焦虑相关的认知影响与治疗方向。

items.title_en: AI job grief: A psychological crisis hitting tech workers
items.title_zh: AI 职业悲痛：科技工作者的心理危机
items.summary_en: A discussion of 'AI job grief'—the anxiety and identity disruption workers feel as automation encroaches on tasks—and its implications for retention, productivity, and mental health in tech industry. It suggests strategies for managing transitions and upskilling.
items.summary_zh: 所谓的“AI 职业悲痛”描述了技术人员在自动化与任务外包压力下的焦虑与身份困境，对留任、生产力和心理健康有广泛影响。文中提出转型与技能提升等应对策略。

items.title_en: C extensions, portability, and alternative compilers
items.title_zh: C 扩展、可移植性与替代编译器
items.summary_en: C extensions boost speed and integration for many languages, but they complicate portability due to ABI stability, compiler quirks, and platform-specific behavior. Developers weigh strategies like using CFFI, safe bindings, or alternative compilers (GCC/Clang/MSVC) to improve portability and maintenance.
items.summary_zh: C 扩展带来性能与无缝集成，但因 ABI 稳定性、编译器差异和平台行为而削弱可移植性。文章讨论权衡点，并给出通过 CFFI、绑定封装或替代编译器（如 GCC/Clang/MSVC）提升跨平台维护性的做法。

items.title_en: Bug 1950764: Work Around Crash on Intel Raptor Lake CPU
items.title_zh: Bug 1950764：应对 Intel Raptor Lake CPU 崩溃的变通解决方法
items.summary_en: Mozilla engineers document a workaround to prevent a crash on Intel Raptor Lake CPUs, signaling ongoing stability work around a hardware-specific fault. The entry shows how large projects ship interim patches to maintain usability while a proper fix is developed.
items.summary_zh: Mozilla 工程师记录了针对 Intel Raptor Lake CPU 崩溃的变通解决方法，表示正在就特定硬件故障进行稳定性工作。该条目展示了在全面修复尚未到位时，大型项目如何先行发布临时补丁以维持可用性。

items.title_en: AI sticker shock hits corporate America
items.title_zh: AI 价格冲击波及美国企业
items.summary_en: AI sticker shock hits corporate America as tool costs, data infrastructure, and governance needs outpace expectations for ROI. Firms face budgeting challenges, vendor lock-in risk, and a push to strengthen MLOps to scale responsibly.
items.summary_zh: AI 价格冲击波及美国企业，工具成本、数据基础设施和治理要求提升，超出初期预期。公司需要权衡成本、供应商锁定风险，并强化 MLOps 来实现可持续规模化。

items.title_en: Bttf is a command line datetime Swiss army knife
items.title_zh: Biff：命令行日期时间瑞士军刀
items.summary_en: Biff bundles date-time parsing, formatting, arithmetic, and other utilities into a single CLI tool. It streamlines scripting and data workflows that repeatedly manipulate timestamps, time zones, and durations.
items.summary_zh: Biff 将日期时间解析、格式化、计算等工具整合到一个命令行工具中，便利需要频繁处理时间戳、时区与时长的脚本与数据工作流。

items.title_en: Pope Leo: opaque AI run by few firms risks "New Forms of Dehumanization"
items.title_zh: 教皇利奥：少数公司掌控且不透明的 AI 将带来新的去人性化
items.summary_en: The pope warns that opaque AI controlled by a few firms risks dehumanization and consolidates power away from people. The message highlights ethical concerns about AI governance, transparency, and the social consequences of centralized tech control.
items.summary_zh: 教皇利奥警告，少数公司掌控且不透明的 AI 可能带来去人性化并削弱人们的自主性。此言凸显了对 AI 治理、透明度与集权化技术控制的伦理担忧。

items.title_en: Matrix Multiplications on GPUs Run Faster When Given “Predictable” Data (2024)
items.title_zh: GPU 的矩阵乘法在数据可预测时跑得更快（2024）
items.summary_en: New findings show GPUs speed up matrix multiplication when input data patterns are predictable, reducing memory latency. This has practical implications for ML workloads, benchmarking, and compiler optimizations. It suggests data layout and pre-processing can meaningfully influence performance.
items.summary_zh: 研究表明，当输入数据模式可预测时，GPU 的矩阵乘法速度更快，降低了内存延迟。这对机器学习负载、基准测试和编译器优化有实际影响，暗示数据布局和预处理可以显著影响性能。

items.title_en: Naphtha shortages in Japan
items.title_zh: 日本石脑油短缺
items.summary_en: Japan is experiencing naphtha shortages, tightening supply for petrochemical production. The shortage elevates feedstock costs and may force chemical plants to throttle production or switch to alternatives, potentially pushing up plastics and synthetic fiber prices. The shortage could affect downstream industries and consumer prices.
items.summary_zh: 短缺还可能影响下游行业与消费者价格。

items.title_en: The just-say-no engineer was a ZIRP phenomenon
items.title_zh: “说不干”的工程师是 ZIRP 时期的产物
items.summary_en: The piece argues that the 'just-say-no engineer' persona emerged under macro conditions associated with ZIRP, where funding and incentives shaped risk tolerance in engineering culture. It examines how financial environments influence technical decision-making.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为“说不干”的工程师形象是在与 ZIRP 相关的宏观环境下成长起来的，资金与激励影响了工程文化中的风险偏好，并讨论了金融环境如何影响技术决策。

items.title_en: Odysseus – self-hosted AI workspace
items.title_zh: Odysseus — 自托管的 AI 工作区
items.summary_en: Odysseus provides a self-hosted AI workspace for teams to manage models and experiments locally, emphasizing privacy, reproducibility, and control. It appeals to developers seeking to avoid vendor lock-in and data leaving their environment.
items.summary_zh: Odysseus 提供一个面向团队的自托管 AI 工作区，便于在本地管理模型与实验，强调隐私、可重复性和对环境的控制。适合希望避免厂商锁定与数据外流的开发者。

items.title_en: Websites have a new way to spy on visitors: analyzing their SSD activity
items.title_zh: 网站新招隐形监视：分析 SSD 活动以窥探访客
items.summary_en: Researchers show websites can glean visitor info by analyzing SSD IO patterns, a surprising and invasive data leakage vector. It motivates stricter browser and OS controls to reduce micro-timing exposures.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员展示网站可以通过分析 SSD IO 模式来推断访客信息，成为一种令人意外且具侵入性的数据泄露途径。促使浏览器和系统加强对微时序泄露的防护。

items.title_en: Having your insulin pump die while you're on vacation
items.title_zh: 度假时胰岛素泵发生故障
items.summary_en: A personal account of insulin pump failure during vacation, revealing how medical IoT devices introduce new risks when away from home. It underscores the importance of backup plans, sensor redundancy, and support options for patients relying on connected devices.
items.summary_zh: 度假期间胰岛素泵发生故障，暴露了医用物联网设备在离家时的新风险。强调备份方案、传感器冗余和紧急支援对依赖连网设备的患者的重要性。

items.title_en: Mastering Dyalog APL
items.title_zh: 精通 Dyalog APL
items.summary_en: Dyalog APL remains one of the most expressive array languages; this resource pack promises practical guidance—from idioms to performance tricks—to help you write concise, fast APL code. It emphasizes vectorized thinking and how to leverage Dyalog’s extensions for real-world data tasks.
items.summary_zh: Dyalog APL 是最具表达力的数组语言之一，这份资源集合提供实用指南—from 常用习惯用法到性能技巧，帮助你写出简洁且高效的 APL 代码。文章强调向量化思维，以及如何利用 Dyalog 的扩展应对实际数据任务。

items.title_en: Memory decline after menopause linked to loss of estrogen production in brain
items.title_zh: 更年期后记忆力下降与脑内雌激素减少相关
items.summary_en: New research links memory decline after menopause to reduced estrogen production in brain tissue, suggesting hormonal changes drive cognitive aging. The findings add to evidence that estrogen plays neuroprotective roles and could inform strategies to mitigate cognitive decline in aging women. Further work may explore targeted hormone therapies or non-hormonal interventions.
items.summary_zh: 未来研究可能探索靶向激素治疗或非激素干预。

items.title_en: Earthion: A New Mega Drive-Style Shoot-Em-Up
items.title_zh: Earthion：一款全新 Mega Drive 风格的射击游戏
items.summary_en: Earthion is a Mega Drive-era style shoot-em-up that blends retro visuals with modern polish and new mechanics. It demonstrates how classic genres can be refreshed for contemporary indie audiences.
items.summary_zh: Earthion 是一款 Mega Drive 风格的射击游戏，结合复古画面与现代打磨及新机制，展示了经典题材在当代独立游戏圈的再创作。

items.title_en: IBM Spins Off the First Pure-Play Quantum Chip Foundry
items.title_zh: IBM 拆分成立首家纯粹的量子芯片代工厂
items.summary_en: IBM spins off a dedicated quantum chip foundry, signaling a shift toward specialized hardware manufacturing for quantum systems. The move could accelerate prototyping and commercialization by offering third-party access to quantum fabrication capabilities, expanding the ecosystem beyond IBM.
items.summary_zh: IBM 将量子芯片代工推向纯粹的商业化专用工厂，标志着量子硬件制造逐步走向专业化。此举可能让更多客户能够接入量子制造能力，加速原型设计和商业化进程，同时扩大生态系统。

items.title_en: I love my Bluetooth keyboard
items.title_zh: 我爱我的蓝牙键盘
items.summary_en: A personal take on using a Bluetooth keyboard, highlighting its portability and quiet typing. The piece weighs tradeoffs like latency, pairing reliability, and battery life, arguing that wireless keyboards remain appealing for developers despite occasional quirks. It showcases how a simple peripheral can boost daily productivity for mobile and multi-device workflows.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享使用蓝牙键盘的个人体验，强调便携性和安静的打字声带来的便利。文中讨论了延迟、配对稳定性和电池续航等取舍，认为尽管偶有小问题，无线键盘仍然是提高多设备工作流效率的有力工具。

items.title_en: I keep bouncing off the Scheme language
items.title_zh: 我一直被 Scheme 语言卡住
items.summary_en: The author chronicles ongoing friction with Scheme, a minimalist Lisp dialect, and reflects on its clean semantics versus a steep learning curve. The piece offers practical takeaways about when its simplicity pays off and when it can hinder progress in real-world projects.
items.summary_zh: 作者记录了自己在学习 Scheme 时不断遇到的困难， Scheme 的极简 Lisp 语法与清晰语义与陡峭的学习曲线形成对比。文章给出在实际项目中何时因其简洁而受益、何时又因学习成本而成为拖累的洞察。

items.title_en: It's Not Just X. It's Y
items.title_zh: 不仅是 X，而是 Y：后训练数据的影响
items.summary_en: The piece argues that data isn’t just what models learn during training; post-training data and user interactions shape model behavior over time. This raises privacy, consent, and governance questions for developers and users alike as AI systems continue to evolve after deployment.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出，数据不仅在训练阶段塑造模型，后训练阶段的数据与用户交互也在持续影响模型行为。这为开发者和用户带来隐私、同意与治理方面的问题，尤其是在AI系统部署后继续演化。

items.title_en: Corporations can vote in some Delaware elections, judge says
items.title_zh: 德拉瓦州某些选举允许公司投票，法官称允许
items.summary_en: A Delaware court has allowed corporations to vote in some local elections, a ruling that could reshape corporate political engagement. The decision prompts questions about corporate personhood and the boundary between business interests and community policy.
items.summary_zh: 法院裁定在部分 Delaware 地方选举中，企业有投票权，这一判决可能改变企业在地方政治中的参与方式与影响力。也提出关于公司人格、治理权与商业利益与社区政策边界的讨论。

items.title_en: Rothko for your current weather conditions
items.title_zh: 以当前天气条件为灵感的罗斯科风格作品
items.summary_en: A playful project maps real-time weather data to Rothko-inspired color fields, producing a living abstract portrait of the sky. The minimal approach highlights how data can be translated into aesthetic experiences, bridging art and weather. It invites reflection on color, mood, and environment.
items.summary_zh: 它也促使人们思考颜色、情绪与环境之间的关系。

items.title_en: The Speed of Prototyping in the Age of AI
items.title_zh: AI时代的原型设计速度
items.summary_en: AI accelerates prototyping by automating design, code, and testing loops, letting teams iterate ideas faster. The flip side is higher risks of tech debt and quality gaps, so teams should pair speed with guardrails like clear requirements and automated testing.
items.summary_zh: AI 让原型设计循环更加快速，自动化设计、编码和测试，帮助团队更快将想法落地。与此同时，追求速度也可能带来技术债务和质量隐患，因此需要用清晰需求和自动化测试等防护措施来平衡。

items.title_en: Ruby for Good
items.title_zh: Ruby for Good：用 Ruby 做善事
items.summary_en: Ruby for Good mobilizes Ruby developers to volunteer on charitable tech projects, combining open-source collaboration with social impact. Participants gain practical experience while nonprofits receive improvements to software and operations.
items.summary_zh: Ruby for Good 号召 Ruby 开发者参与慈善项目的技术工作，将开源协作与社会影响结合起来。参与者获得实战经验，非营利组织获得软件和运营上的改进。

items.title_en: A Eureka machine that thinks like nature and explores what AI cannot
items.title_zh: 像自然一样思考的尤里卡机器：探索AI无法胜任的领域
items.summary_en: A nature-inspired 'Eureka' machine tackles problems that standard AI struggles with, hinting at new computational paradigms. By borrowing strategies from nature—adaptation, robustness, and self-organization—it reveals limits of current AI and points toward future research directions.
items.summary_zh: 一台受自然启发的“尤里卡”机器，尝试解决传统AI难以胜任的问题，揭示了新的计算范式潜力。通过借鉴自然界的适应性、鲁棒性与自我组织等策略，展示了现有AI的局限并指向未来的研究方向。

items.title_en: Bytecode VMs in surprising places (2024)
items.title_zh: 字节码虚拟机在意想不到的地方（2024）
items.summary_en: This piece surveys how bytecode virtual machines appear beyond traditional desktops, showing up in GPUs, databases, edge devices, and other runtimes. It discusses portability, performance, and security implications of embedding VM technology across different platforms. The trend highlights bytecode as a versatile abstraction for cross-platform execution.
items.summary_zh: 文章梳理了字节码虚拟机在传统桌面之外的多种应用场景，如GPU、数据库、边缘设备等运行时环境。讨论了跨平台执行的可移植性、性能与安全性等影响，凸显字节码作为跨平台执行的多功能抽象层。

items.title_en: Investigating how prompt politeness affects LLM accuracy (2025)
items.title_zh: 研究提示礼貌如何影响大模型准确性（2025）
items.summary_en: An empirical study tests whether polite phrasing of prompts changes LLM outputs and accuracy across tasks, finding mostly small and task-dependent effects. The paper suggests politeness can alter model calibration or response framing but doesn't consistently boost objective correctness, so prompt tone matters more for user experience than raw accuracy in many cases.
items.summary_zh: 一项实证研究检验了礼貌用语是否会改变大模型在不同任务上的输出与准确性，发现影响普遍较小且依赖任务。研究表明礼貌可能影响模型的置信度或回应风格，但并不稳定地提高客观正确率，因此提示语气在用户体验上更有影响，而非始终提升准确性。

items.title_en: Use boring languages with LLMs
items.title_zh: 用无聊的编程语言与大模型协作
items.summary_en: Proposes using simpler, well-understood languages with LLM workflows to reduce ambiguity and safety concerns. Shows that boring languages can improve prompt reliability and tooling interoperability. Provides guidance on choosing languages and integration patterns that fit LLMs.
items.summary_zh: 作者建议用简单、易理解的编程语言与大语言模型工作流协作，以减少歧义和安全风险。无趣的语言能提升提示的可预测性和工具链的互操作性。给出在与大模型协作时选型和集成模式的实用建议。

items.title_en: What if remote working, not AI, is to blame for weak junior hiring?
items.title_zh: 若是远程工作，而非 AI，成为初级招聘乏力的原因？
items.summary_en: The FT piece argues that remote work dynamics—hiring pipelines, wage inflation, and distributed interviewing—may be more responsible for weak junior hiring than AI automation. It explores implications for recruiters and policy on training, compensation, and onboarding.
items.summary_zh: 金融时报的文章认为，远程工作带来的招聘管道、薪资膨胀和分布式面试等因素，可能比 AI 自动化更致力于削弱初级岗位招聘。内容探讨对招聘、培训、薪酬和入职流程的影响。

items.title_en: Phantasy Star IV – 1993 Developer Interviews
items.title_zh: Phantasy Star IV：1993 年开发者访谈
items.summary_en: A curio for retro fans, these interviews shed light on design constraints and decisions behind PSIV, including party balance, writing, and hardware limits.
items.summary_zh: 这组 1993 年的开发者访谈为怀旧玩家提供珍贵洞见，揭示了《幻影星尘 IV》在人物平衡、剧情撰写与硬件限制等方面的设计取舍。

items.title_en: Cheese Paper: a text editor specifically designed for writing
items.title_zh: Cheese Paper：专为写作设计的文本编辑器
items.summary_en: Presents Cheese Paper as a writing-focused editor that minimizes distractions and optimizes the drafting workflow, likely with focused modes, export options, and writer-friendly typography. Highlights why specialized writing tools matter.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Cheese Paper 作为专注写作的文本编辑器，强调最小化干扰、优化写作流程，并提供导出与排版友好的特性。强调此类专门工具对提升写作效率的作用。

items.title_en: Alexander Grothendieck Revolutionized 20th-Century Mathematics
items.title_zh: 亚历山大·格罗滕迪克如何革新了20世纪数学
items.summary_en: Grothendieck profoundly reshaped 20th-century mathematics by advancing categories, toposes, and structural thinking. The piece traces how his ideas redirected the field toward abstraction and unifying frameworks that influenced algebraic geometry and beyond.
items.summary_zh: 格罗滕迪克通过推进范畴、层概念以及结构化思维，深刻改变了20世纪的数学。文章梳理了他如何把数学推向高度抽象的统一框架，深远影响了代数几何及其他领域。

items.title_en: Lombardy increases charges for the construction of data centres in green areas
items.title_zh: 伦巴第提高在绿色区域建设数据中心的收费
items.summary_en: Lombardy increases charges for constructing data centers in green or agricultural zones by up to 200%, in an effort to curb environmental impact. The policy alters data center economics and site selection, with potential spillovers for regional investment.
items.summary_zh: 伦巴第地区提高在绿色或农业用地建设数据中心的费用，最高可达200%，以控制环境影响。此举将影响数据中心的经济性与选址决策，并可能影响区域投资。

items.title_en: The Ask
items.title_zh: 请求的艺术
items.summary_en: Advice on how to make clear, responsible requests in work and life—framing asks with context, desired outcomes and constraints so others can respond effectively. The key takeaway is that good requests reduce friction, clarify ownership, and increase the chance of getting what you need without creating hidden obligations.
items.summary_zh: 关于如何在工作与生活中提出清晰、有责任感的请求：用背景、期望结果和限制来框定，让对方能有效回应。要点是：好的请求能减少摩擦、明确责任并提高达成目标的可能，同时避免产生隐含义务。

items.title_en: What color is your function? (2015)
items.title_zh: 你的函数是什么颜色？（2015）
items.summary_en: What color is your function? uses a playful color metaphor to categorize functions by effects and purity, encouraging readers to think about side effects, referential transparency, and how language design shapes code reasoning.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章用有趣的颜色隐喻来划分函数的副作用与纯净性，鼓励开发者在语言设计与代码可读性之间做权衡。它促使读者思考语言特性如何影响程序的推理难度与可维护性。

items.title_en: Daily pill can double survival time for deadliest cancer, trial shows
items.title_zh: 每日口服药物可将最致命癌症的生存期翻倍，临床试验显示
items.summary_en: A daily pill in a pancreatic cancer trial doubled median survival, representing a potential breakthrough in a notoriously hard-to-treat cancer. While promising, results need independent replication and longer follow-up to confirm durability and safety.
items.summary_zh: 在一项针对胰腺癌的临床试验中，日服药物使中位生存期翻倍，显示出在这一顽疾上的潜在突破。需进一步独立验证和更长随访以确认长期效果与安全性。

items.title_en: The C64 Dead Test Font
items.title_zh: C64 的 Dead Test 字体
items.summary_en: A faithful recreation of the Commodore 64's iconic Dead Test font, enabling pixel-perfect retro typography in modern projects. The bitmap glyphs reproduce the C64 look for use in emulators, demos, and educational materials without relying on legacy ROMs. This underscores ongoing interest in authentic vintage typography for authenticity in demos and tutorials.
items.summary_zh: 忠实再现了 Commodore 64 的 Dead Test 位图字形，使现代项目能够实现像素级的复古字体效果。此字体便于在仿真器、演示和教学材料中再现 C64 的风格，而无需依赖旧 ROM。显示出在演示与教育场景中对复古排版真实性的持续需求。

items.title_en: Tulip mania: when a single flower was worth more than a house (2025)
items.title_zh: 郁金香热：单朵花比房子还贵（2025）
items.summary_en: An updated take on the tulip mania analogy, using 2025 markets to illustrate how speculative bubbles form, the psychology of hype, and why risk management matters for investors and builders in tech-adjacent assets.
items.summary_zh: 用2025年的市场案例更新郁金香热的比喻，揭示投机泡沫如何形成、炒作心理，以及科技相关资产中的风险管理重要性。

items.title_en: Gemini, Gophers, and Fingers. Oh My Alternative Internets Beyond HTTPS
items.title_zh: Gemini、Gophers 与 Fingers：超越 HTTPS 的替代互联网
items.summary_en: Examines Gemini, Gophers, and Fingers as alternative internet protocols, arguing they offer lightweight, privacy-respecting access to information beyond HTTPS, while noting practical limits and adoption barriers.
items.summary_zh: 评析 Gemini、Gophers 与 Fingers 等替代互联网协议，认为它们在超越 HTTPS 的同时提供轻量化、更注重隐私的内容访问，但也存在实际采用的局限性。

items.title_en: To have a moral stance on AI is to be an outcast, and it sucks
items.title_zh: 在 AI 上坚持道德立场就是成了局外人，这很糟糕
items.summary_en: The piece argues that taking a strong moral stance on AI often makes you an outcast in tech circles and corporate settings, a position the author finds frustrating. It urges a pragmatic approach: consider concrete harms, governance, and accountability rather than pursuing purity tests. The piece reflects ongoing debate about ethics versus innovation in AI.
items.summary_zh: 这场讨论也映射出 AI 伦理与创新之间持续的博弈。

items.title_en: Raft Consensus with a Minority of Nodes
items.title_zh: 少数节点下的 Raft 共识
items.summary_en: Explores how Raft behaves when only a minority of nodes are available, highlighting tradeoffs between progress and safety in partitions and resilience. The discussion has practical implications for designing fault-tolerant distributed systems.
items.summary_zh: 分析在只有少数节点可用时 Raft 的表现，指出在分区与弹性场景下进展与安全性之间的权衡，对设计容错分布式系统具有实践意义。

items.title_en: A portentous reunion
items.title_zh: 一次具有里程碑意义的重聚
items.summary_en: A Portentous Reunion marks a milestone gathering of key technologists, inviting reflection on the field’s direction and what comes next for the community.
items.summary_zh: 一次具有里程碑意义的重聚聚集了行业内的关键科技人士，促使人们思考该领域的未来方向及社区的下一步走向。

items.title_en: Human Bottlenecks
items.title_zh: 人类瓶颈
items.summary_en: Human Bottlenecks argues that human limitations shape system design, proposing interfaces and processes that reduce cognitive load, delay fatigue, and improve reliability in technology workflows.
items.summary_zh: 《人类瓶颈》主张人类局限性决定系统设计，应提出降低认知负荷、延缓疲劳、提升技术工作流程可靠性的界面与流程。

items.title_en: Jensen–Shannon Divergence
items.title_zh: 詹森-香农散度
items.summary_en: Jensen–Shannon Divergence is a symmetric measure of difference between two probability distributions, derived from KL divergence, widely used to quantify distributional similarity in ML and information theory. It is bounded and interpretable, making it a popular choice for comparing distributions and model outputs.
items.summary_zh: 詹森-香农散度是一个对称且有界的概率分布差异度量，由两个分布对均值分布的KL散度的平均推导而来。它在机器学习中用于比较模型输出、评估聚类以及衡量分布相似性，通常比KL散度更稳定。

items.title_en: Orchestrating AI code review at scale
items.title_zh: 在大规模场景下编排 AI 代码审查
items.summary_en: Cloudflare outlines approaches to orchestrate AI-powered code review at scale, covering governance, tooling integration, and data handling to maintain quality across large codebases.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 介绍在大规模代码库中进行 AI 代码审查的方案，涵盖治理、工具链集成和数据处理，以维持代码质量。

items.title_en: The Forgotten Art of the LAN Party (2023)
items.title_zh: 被遗忘的局域网聚会艺术（2023）
items.summary_en: Revisits LAN parties as a social-technical phenomenon: in 2023 they remain valuable for hands-on hardware tinkering, local multiplayer energy, and community building that online-only ecosystems can't replicate. The piece also offers practical tips to revive the scene, from retro rigs to local networks and shared screens.
items.summary_zh: 本文回顾 2023 年的局域网聚会文化，认为线下的设备共享、现场改装和本地多人互动仍然带来独特的技术乐趣与社交氛围，线上生态难以完全替代。文章还给出重振这类聚会的思路，如组织经济友好的装置、优化局域网和共享显示等。

items.title_en: The mysterious Hy3 LLM is topping OpenRouter Model Rankings by a large margin
items.title_zh: 神秘的 Hy3 大型语言模型在 OpenRouter 排名中遥遥领先
items.summary_en: Hy3, a mysterious language model, is posting dominant results on the OpenRouter model rankings, outperforming well-known competitors by a wide margin. The surge highlights rapid advances in open-access LLMs and raises questions about evaluation benchmarks, deployment practicality, and potential applications.
items.summary_zh: 神秘的 Hy3 大语言模型在 OpenRouter 的排行榜中遥遥领先，远超其他知名模型。此现象反映开放生态下的快速进展，同时也引发对评测标准、落地应用和成本的讨论。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Is anyone working at least 4 hours daily on an Apple Vision Pro?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：有人每天至少在 Apple Vision Pro 上工作4小时吗？
items.summary_en: The discussion gathers practitioner anecdotes about daily Vision Pro usage, development time, and productivity trade-offs. It reveals early-stage expectations about AR hardware, hardware ergonomics, and the viability of long-form work in spatial apps.
items.summary_zh: 讨论汇集了关于每日在 Vision Pro 上工作四小时以上的从业者经验，涉及开发时间、生产力权衡以及对 AR 硬件的期望。揭示了对在空间应用中长时间工作的现实可行性、硬件的人机工效与局限。

items.title_en: Warm up your MacBook (2019)
items.title_zh: 给 MacBook 预热
items.summary_en: A practical guide on keeping MacBooks responsive by warming up the machine before heavy workloads, including tips like allowing fans to ramp and preconditioning temperature to reduce thermal throttling.
items.summary_zh: 本文提供在执行高负载任务前对 MacBook 进行预热的实用做法，包括让风扇启动、对温度进行预调以减少热降频，从而保持系统的响应性。

items.title_en: Macsurf, "modern" web browser for macOS 9
items.title_zh: Macsurf：为 macOS 9 提供的“现代”网页浏览器
items.summary_en: Macsurf is a modern web browser built to run on macOS 9, targeting vintage hardware and software enthusiasts. It tackles modern web compatibility challenges on old systems, potentially reviving legacy Macs. The project highlights ongoing interest in preserving and extending aging computing platforms.
items.summary_zh: 这也反映出对老系统持续兴趣与兼容性挑战。

items.title_en: Parallel Reconstruction of Lawful TLS Wiretapping
items.title_zh: 对合法 TLS 监听的并行重建
items.summary_en: A project demonstrating how lawful TLS wiretapping can be reproduced in parallel, highlighting complexities in intercepting encrypted traffic and the importance of secure, auditable crypto tooling. It underscores evolving debates over privacy, surveillance, and the trade-offs in lawful interception tech.
items.summary_zh: 该项目在并行化框架中重现实验合法 TLS 拦截的过程，凸显对互联加密流量的拦截所面临的技术挑战与审计需求。也引发对隐私、合规与安全工具可信度的讨论。

items.title_en: Show HN: 500 years of Joseon court omens as an observability dashboard
items.title_zh: Show HN：用500年朝鲜王朝卜兆做成的可观测性仪表板
items.summary_en: A creative project that maps centuries of court omens to a modern observability dashboard, showcasing how historical data can be modeled with modern tooling for storytelling and insights. It illustrates the portability of observability concepts to unconventional data sources.
items.summary_zh: 一个将500年朝鲜王朝的卜兆映射为可观测性仪表盘的创意项目，展示历史数据也能用现代监控思路来讲故事和提取洞察。它展示了可观测性工具在非传统数据源上的潜力。

items.title_en: The UK government's Low Value Purchase System is a waste of time
items.title_zh: 英国政府的低值采购体系是浪费时间
items.summary_en: Critique of the UK's Low Value Purchase System as bureaucratic overhead that slows down procurement. The post argues for streamlined processes and better alignment with modern digital procurement needs.
items.summary_zh: 对英国低值采购体系的批评指向繁琐的官僚流程拖慢采购效率。文章主张简化流程，更好地与现代数字化采购需求对齐。

items.title_en: A pictorial introduction to differential geometry (2017)
items.title_zh: 微分几何图解入门（2017）
items.summary_en: A pictorial introduction to differential geometry (2017) uses diagrams and imagery to make advanced math more approachable. It covers core ideas such as manifolds, connections, and curvature with intuitive visuals. It's a handy resource for students or engineers needing geometric intuition.
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇以图解方式介绍微分几何的2017年作品，通过大量图示将高等数学的概念变得直观。 内容涵盖流形、连接与曲率等核心要点。 对需要几何直觉的学生或工程师来说，是一份实用的学习资源。

items.title_en: The most unlikely school bag
items.title_zh: 世界上最不可能成为书包的包
items.summary_en: The piece spotlights unconventional bags that people actually use for school, challenging the notion of a single perfect school bag. By examining design choices, ergonomics, and everyday carry needs, the article shows how bag culture adapts to new lifestyles.
items.summary_zh: 文章聚焦那些被人实际用于上学但并非传统的背包，挑战“完美书包”的单一概念。通过分析设计、人体工学和日常携带需求，揭示背包文化如何顺应新生活方式而变化。

items.title_en: Opaque Types in Python
items.title_zh: Python中的不透明类型
items.summary_en: A dive into opaque types for Python typing, explaining how you can hide internal representations behind a stable API to improve abstraction, maintainability, and type safety.
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍 Python 类型系统中的不透明类型，讲解如何将内部实现隐藏在稳定的 API 之后，以提升抽象性、可维护性和静态类型的安全性。

items.title_en: Perceptual Image Codec: What Matters in Practical Learned Image Compression
items.title_zh: 感知图像编解码：实用学习型图像压缩中的要点
items.summary_en: This overview distills what actually matters in practical learned image compression: perceptual quality, rate-distortion trade-offs, training data, and deployment robustness. It argues for metrics and architectures that maintain perceptual fidelity under real-world constraints.
items.summary_zh: 本文提炼了实用的学习型图像压缩的关键要点：感知质量、码率-失真权衡、训练数据与落地稳健性。作者主张在实际约束下，选择能维持感知保真度的指标与架构。

items.title_en: One year of Roto, a compiled scripting language for Rust
items.title_zh: 一年时间的 Roto：为 Rust 编写的编译型脚本语言
items.summary_en: Roto is a compiled scripting language designed for Rust, intended to be embedded and fast. After a year of development, the project highlights progress, design decisions, and compelling use cases for scripting in Rust ecosystems. It emphasizes performance, ergonomics, and seamless interoperability with Rust code.
items.summary_zh: Roto 是为 Rust 设计的编译型脚本语言，旨在便于嵌入且运行迅速。 一年来的开发中，项目展示了进展、设计取舍以及在 Rust 生态中对脚本化的潜在应用。 它强调性能、可用性以及与 Rust 代码的无缝互操作性。

items.title_en: Performance of Rust Language [pdf]
items.title_zh: Rust 性能表现（PDF）
items.summary_en: A Rust performance presentation (PDF) surveys Rust's speed, benchmarks, and optimization ideas, illustrating how safety can coexist with high performance.
items.summary_zh: 这份关于 Rust 性能的演示文稿概述了速度、基准和优化思路，展示在保持安全性的同时实现高性能的途径。

items.title_en: Avian Visitors
items.title_zh: 鸟类来访者
items.summary_en: A project focused on documenting visiting birds, blending natural observation with accessible visuals.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦于记录来访鸟类，将自然观察与易于理解的视觉呈现结合起来。

items.title_en: Announcing Rust 1.96
items.title_zh: Rust 1.96 发布
items.summary_en: Rust 1.96 release introduces new standard library improvements and language enhancements, with incremental improvements to APIs, compiler diagnostics, and stability. The update continues Rust's pattern of steady, practical growth.
items.summary_zh: Rust 1.96 版本带来标准库和语言层面的改进，包含对 API、编译器诊断与稳定性的持续提升，体现了 Rust 稳健、务实的迭代风格。

items.title_en: The four programming questions from my 1994 Microsoft internship interview (2023)
items.title_zh: 我在1994年微软实习面试中的四道编程题（2023 版）
items.summary_en: A retrospective look at four classic interview questions from a 1994 Microsoft internship, reexamined in 2023 context.
items.summary_zh: 回顾1994年微软实习面试中的四道经典编程题，在2023年的语境下重新审视。文中强调长期不变的算法思维以及基础知识在当今编程面试中的持久价值，为求职者提供可操作的要点。

items.title_en: Show HN: Helios – what plug-in solar could generate for any address in Britain
items.title_zh: Show HN：Helios——英国任意地址的插件太阳能潜力估算工具
items.summary_en: Show HN: Helios explores plug-in solar for Britain—estimating how much solar energy a given address could generate, enabling homeowners and planners to model distributed generation.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Helios 探索在英国的插件式太阳能潜力，估算任意地址可产出的电力，用于帮助房主与规划者建模分布式发电。

items.title_en: C array types are weird
items.title_zh: C 语言中的数组类型真的很奇怪
items.summary_en: It reinforces why a solid grasp of the array-pointer boundary is essential for safe, correct C programming.
items.summary_zh: 文章揭示了 C 语言数组类型中的若干微妙怪异之处，包括数组如何衰变为指针、指针运算与下标访问的交互，以及容易踩坑的边界情况。强调理解数组与指针之间的界限对实现安全、正确的 C 编程至关重要。

items.title_en: Show HN: Breathe CLI – Paced resonance breathing in the macOS terminal
items.title_zh: Show HN：Breathe CLI——在 macOS 终端中进行节拍共振呼吸
items.summary_en: Breathe CLI is a macOS terminal based tool that guides you through paced resonance breathing. Its simple CLI interface demonstrates how lightweight wellness tooling can integrate into a developer workflow. It shows how terminal apps can support focus and stress relief during long coding sessions.
items.summary_zh: Breathe CLI 是一个在 macOS 终端中引导节拍共振呼吸的工具。它的简易命令行界面展示了轻量级健康工具如何融入开发者的日常工作流程。该项目展示了在长时间编码中，终端应用也能支持专注与减压。

items.title_en: Microcode inside the Intel 8087 floating-point chip: register exchange
items.title_zh: 英特尔 8087 浮点协处理器内的微代码：寄存器交换
items.summary_en: A peek inside the 8087’s microcode reveals how register exchange and operand handling were implemented in the original FPU. The piece sheds light on low-level CPU design decisions, illustrating the complexity hidden beneath vintage hardware.
items.summary_zh: 对英特尔 8087 浮点协处理器的微代码进行揭密，讲述寄存器交换和操作数处理在早期FPU中的实现方式。此文揭示了隐藏在古老硬件背后的低层CPU设计决策与复杂性。

items.title_en: Perry Compiles TypeScript directly to executables using SWC and LLVM
items.title_zh: Perry 将 TypeScript 直接编译为可执行文件，采用 SWC 与 LLVM
items.summary_en: A new approach compiles TypeScript directly into native executables by leveraging SWC for parsing and LLVM as a backend. This cuts out the Node.js runtime, potentially shrinking binary size and improving startup times while preserving TS type safety.
items.summary_zh: Perry 将 TypeScript 直接编译成本地可执行文件，利用 SWC 作为前端编译器、LLVM 作为后端生成。省去 Node.js 运行时，理论上能减小二进制体积、缩短启动时间，同时保留 TypeScript 的类型特性。

items.title_en: BadHost – CVE-2026-48710: Starlette Host-Header Auth Bypass
items.title_zh: BadHost – CVE-2026-48710：Starlette 主机头认证绕过
items.summary_en: A vulnerability in Starlette (CVE-2026-48710) allows an authentication bypass via crafted host headers, impacting apps relying on host header validation. The issue underscores the risk of header-based auth and the need for patching and supplemental mitigations. Upgrade and review deployment configurations to reduce exposure.
items.summary_zh: Starlette 的 CVE-2026-48710 漏洞通过操控的主机头实现认证绕过，影响依赖主机头校验的应用。此问题凸显了基于头信息的认证风险，需要尽快打补丁并加强访问控制。请升级并检查部署配置以降低暴露度。

items.title_en: AI errno(2) values
items.title_zh: AI errno(2) 值
items.summary_en: A playful yet practical proposal to extend errno-style error codes to AI systems, enabling clearer debugging and service reliability. The piece advocates standardized, machine-readable errors to speed incident response for ML-powered services.
items.summary_zh: 将 errno 风格的错误编码映射到 AI 系统，旨在提高调试和服务可靠性。文章倡导标准化、可机器读的错误信息，以提升对 ML 服务的事件响应效率。

items.title_en: You weren't meant to have a boss (2008)
items.title_zh: 你本不该有老板（2008）
items.summary_en: Paul Graham's You Weren't Meant to Have a Boss (2008) argues for reducing hierarchical management and empowering individuals, critiquing traditional bosses and suggesting flatter, more autonomous work structures.
items.summary_zh: 保罗·格雷厄姆的《你本不该有老板》（2008）主张减少等级化管理，强调个人自治与更扁平的工作结构，对传统的老板制提出批评。文中探讨了替代性组织模式和自我驱动的工作方式。

items.title_en: It takes two neurons to ride a bicycle (2004)
items.title_zh: 骑自行车需要两颗神经元
items.summary_en: It highlights implications for neuroscience, AI, and how we model minimal behavior.
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨极简神经回路是否足以支撑简单运动任务，挑战了对神经元复杂性的普遍假设。对神经科学、人工智能以及最小行为建模具有启发意义。

items.title_en: Don't Subscribe So Casually
items.title_zh: 别再随便订阅了
items.summary_en: The post argues that subscription programs require more scrutiny: low-friction signups often trap customers into long, costly commitments and opaque value. It suggests strategies for evaluating subscriptions, prioritizing controllable costs, and thinking about true value.
items.summary_zh: 文章提醒读者不要对订阅模式掉以轻心：低门槛加入往往带来长期、难以取消的成本和不透明的价值。作者还提出评估订阅的策略，强调控制开支并关注真实获益。

items.title_en: Silk: Open-source cooperative fiber scheduler
items.title_zh: Silk：开源的协作式纤程调度器
items.summary_en: Silk is an open-source cooperative scheduler designed to efficiently manage many lightweight tasks by yielding control explicitly. It enables high throughput with low overhead, fitting into data-processing stacks like ClickHouse. It’s a notable alternative to preemptive kernels for certain workloads.
items.summary_zh: Silk 是一个开源的协作式调度器，通过显式让出控制来高效管理大量轻量任务。它在低开销下实现高吞吐，适用于数据处理堆栈（如 ClickHouse），是对特定工作负载的有力替代方案。

items.title_en: Expertise in the age of AI
items.title_zh: AI时代的专业知识
items.summary_en: The essay argues that expertise will adapt in the AI age, redefining what counts as expertise, and emphasizing human judgment, domain knowledge, and ethical considerations as AI handles routine tasks. It invites readers to rethink training and collaboration models.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为在 AI 时代，专业知识将适应并重新定义何为专业，强调人类判断、领域知识及伦理考量在 AI 处理常规任务时的重要性，促使人们重新思考培训与协作模式。

items.title_en: C constructs that still don't work in C++
items.title_zh: 在 C++ 中仍然不可用的 C 构造
items.summary_en: The article catalogs C language constructs that fail to compile or behave differently in C++, highlighting the gaps between C and C++ language compatibility. It warns developers blending C and C++ about pitfalls and which features remain non-portable.
items.summary_zh: 文中列出了一些在 C 语言中可用、但在 C++ 中仍无法正常工作的构造，揭示了两种语言在语法与语义上的差异。对于在 C 代码混合到 C++ 项目中的开发者，这些坑点尤为重要，指出哪些特性仍未实现跨语言的一致性。

items.title_en: Jef Raskin, the Visionary Behind the Mac (2013)
items.title_zh: 推动 Mac 的远见者：Jef Raskin
items.summary_en: A retrospective on Jef Raskin, the visionary behind the Macintosh, exploring his influence on human-centered design and the early ecology of Apple products. The piece reflects on his ideas about interface, usability, and the role of design leadership in shaping modern computing.
items.summary_zh: 对 Mac 创始人之一 Jef Raskin 的回顾，聚焦他在以人为本设计和苹果产品早期生态中的影响。文章探讨他对界面、易用性以及设计领导力的观点，以及它们如何塑造现代计算。

items.title_en: Sonny Rollins, jazz saxophonist, has died
items.title_zh: 桑尼·罗林斯爵士去世
items.summary_en: Jazz legend Sonny Rollins has died, marking the end of an era in improvisational saxophone. The obituary reflects on his influence, innovations, and enduring sound that shaped modern jazz.
items.summary_zh: 爵士萨克斯传奇人物桑尼·罗林斯去世，标志着即兴演奏传统的一代谢落。纪念文章回顾了他在音色、即兴与乐队领导方面的影响力。

items.title_en: Scientists solve 200-year-old puzzle of how tobacco plants make nicotine
items.title_zh: 科学家破解烟草植物合成尼古丁的长期谜题
items.summary_en: Researchers reveal the enzymatic steps tobacco plants use to synthesize nicotine, solving a two-century-old puzzle. The discovery opens doors for bioengineering nicotine pathways and advances plant biochemistry.
items.summary_zh: 研究揭示烟草植物合成尼古丁的酶促步骤，解决了持续两百年的难题。此发现为尼古丁生物合成路径的生物工程应用以及植物生物化学研究带来新可能。

items.title_en: Dusklight – GC Twilight Princess Decompiled
items.title_zh: Dusklight：GameCube 版《暮色公主》反编译
items.summary_en: Dusklight is a decompilation of The Legend of Zelda: Twilight Princess for GameCube, illustrating how reverse engineering projects reveal internal structures of classic games. It demonstrates the ongoing interest in hardware-constrained software archaeology and can inform security research and emulator development.
items.summary_zh: Dusklight 将《塞尔达传说：暮色公主》 GameCube 版本进行反编译，揭示这款经典游戏的内部结构。该工作体现了对硬件约束下软件考古的热情，并可能为安全研究与模拟器开发提供线索。

items.title_en: Legislation Killed Would Have Effectively Blocked Police LPR, Including Flock
items.title_zh: 立法未通过 本应有效阻止警方的车牌识别技术
items.summary_en: A bipartisan amendment to restrict police use of automated license plate readers was killed, leaving LPR deployments and data practices largely unchanged. The episode highlights privacy concerns around law enforcement surveillance and how policy gaps shape vendor deployments.
items.summary_zh: 一项两党提案旨在限制警方使用车牌识别等监控技术，但最终被否决。此事凸显了对执法监控的隐私担忧，以及政策缺口对厂商部署和数据使用的影响。

items.title_en: A New Typst Template for Pandoc (2025)
items.title_zh: 用于 Pandoc 的新 Typst 模板（2025）
items.summary_en: A modern Typst template for Pandoc workflows that brings high-quality typesetting, native typography and easier citation handling to document conversions. It streamlines producing print-ready PDFs from Markdown and other sources while leveraging Typst's layout features to replace traditional LaTeX templates.
items.summary_zh: 一个面向 Pandoc 的现代 Typst 模板，为文档转换带来更好的版面排版、原生排字和更方便的引用处理。它简化了从 Markdown 等源生成印刷级 PDF 的流程，利用 Typst 的布局能力替代传统 LaTeX 模板。

items.title_en: What Is a Direct Attach Copper (DAC) Cable? (2021)
items.title_zh: 直接附加铜缆（DAC）是什么
items.summary_en: DAC cables are short-range, high-speed copper interconnects used for server connections, offering cost and power advantages over fiber for inside-rack links. They bring simplicity and low latency but trade off maximum distance. This staple of data-center design remains relevant as workloads shift toward dense, power-efficient topologies.
items.summary_zh: 直接附加铜缆（DAC）是一种用于服务器的短距离高速铜缆，相较光纤在机架内链路具有成本与功耗优势。它的优点是简单、低延迟，但距离受限。DAC 仍然是数据中心设计中的重要选择，尤其在追求高密度与低功耗的拓扑中。

items.title_en: Show HN: Write your BPF programs in Go, not C
items.title_zh: Show HN：用Go编写BPF程序，而非C
items.summary_en: A project enables writing eBPF programs in Go, translating Go into BPF bytecode. This lowers the barrier to kernel-level tooling and could influence the ecosystem of BPF-based observability and networking.
items.summary_zh: 一个项目允许用Go语言编写eBPF程序并将其编译为BPF字节码，降低了内核级工具开发的门槛。此举可能影响基于BPF的观测与网络工具生态。

items.title_en: The Ballad of TIGIT
items.title_zh: TIGIT之歌
items.summary_en: TIGIT is a checkpoint receptor in cancer immunotherapy. The piece traces its development, clinical promise, and the challenges of turning checkpoint biology into reliable treatments.
items.summary_zh: TIGIT 是肿瘤免疫治疗中的一种免疫检查点受体。文章梳理了其发展、潜在临床价值以及将相关生物学转化为可靠治疗方案的挑战。

items.title_en: Italians and Dutch share the same gestural instinct for teaching
items.title_zh: 意大利人与荷兰人教学手势具有相同的直觉
items.summary_en: A study finds Italians and Dutch share similar gestural instincts in teaching, suggesting cross-cultural parallels in how instructors use hand movements and spatial cues to convey ideas. The finding has implications for multilingual classrooms and educational tech that relies on nonverbal cues.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现意大利人和荷兰人在教学中的手势直觉存在相似性，表明在用手势和空间提示传达概念方面存在跨文化共性。对多语言课堂和依赖非语言线索的教育技术具有启示。

items.title_en: Show HN: Open-source private home security camera system (end-to-end encryption)
items.title_zh: Show HN：Open-source 私有家庭安防系统（端对端加密）
items.summary_en: An open-source, private home security system offers end-to-end encryption and self-hosting, reducing reliance on cloud services and increasing privacy. It demonstrates a growing DIY security ecosystem where users control data and firmware.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个开源的私有家庭安防系统，具备端对端加密与自托管能力，减少对云服务的依赖并提升隐私保护。它体现了日益成熟的自建安防生态，用户可掌控数据与固件。

items.title_en: Endive: A JVM native WebAssembly runtime
items.title_zh: Endive：一个面向 JVM 的原生 WebAssembly 运行时
items.summary_en: Endive provides a JVM-native WebAssembly runtime, enabling Wasm modules to run with Java interoperability and low overhead. It opens up potential use cases for server-side Wasm and plugin ecosystems within the JVM ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Endive 提供在 JVM 上原生运行 WebAssembly 的运行时，实现 Wasm 模块与 Java 的互操作与较低开销。它为服务器端 Wasm 和插件生态带来新的实现路径。

items.title_en: Using HTTP/2 Cleartext for a server in Go 1.24
items.title_zh: 在 Go 1.24 中为服务器使用 HTTP/2 明文传输（H2C）
items.summary_en: Go 1.24 enables serving HTTP/2 over cleartext (h2c), which can simplify certain internal deployments or proxy setups.
items.summary_zh: Go 1.24 现在支持在明文下提供 HTTP/2（H2C），适用于某些内部部署或代理场景。文中介绍如何在 Go 中开启 H2C，并讨论相关的安全性与兼容性权衡。

items.title_en: wolfSSL releases a new product; wolfCOSE a zero alloc C embbedded COSE stack
items.title_zh: wolfSSL 推出新产品 wolfCOSE：零分配的嵌入式 COSE 堆栈
items.summary_en: wolfCOSE offers a zero-allocation COSE stack designed for embedded C, reducing runtime memory churn and GC pressure, which is critical for constrained devices and secure communications. This release highlights how crypto stacks can optimize memory safety and performance in IoT and edge devices.
items.summary_zh: wolfCOSE 是一个零分配的嵌入式 COSE 堆栈，旨在减少运行时内存分配和碎片，降低嵌入式设备的资源压力。此举强调在物联网与边缘场景中，通过高效、内存友好型加密组件提升安全性与性能。

items.title_en: Bitburner, programming-based incremental game
items.title_zh: Bitburner：一款以编程为核心的增量游戏
items.summary_en: Bitburner blends incremental gameplay with real coding in JavaScript, tasking players with writing scripts to perform simulated hacking and growth. It is a playful way to practice problem solving, learn automation, and explore algorithmic thinking inside a game.
items.summary_zh: Bitburner 将增量式游戏玩法与真实编码结合，玩家需要用 JavaScript 编写脚本来进行模拟的黑客任务并壮大。它把编程练习、自动化学习和算法思维带入游戏之中。

items.title_en: We are Poles, so, of course, we print in Latin
items.title_zh: 我们是波兰人，所以当然用拉丁字母印刷
items.summary_en: A cultural note on Polish typography and branding choosing Latin script; it discusses how language and script decisions influence design choices. The piece sheds light on localization and script topology in a regional context.
items.summary_zh: 关于波兰人在排版与品牌设计中选择拉丁字母的文化笔记，讨论语言与文字选择如何影响设计决策。该文章从区域视角揭示本地化与字体选择的影响。

items.title_en: Social Animus
items.title_zh: 社会敌意
items.summary_en: A meditation on social animus in online spaces, analyzing how polarization and hostility arise and spread.
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨在线空间中的社会敌意，分析极化与敌意如何产生与传播。文章就设计者与平台在抑制有毒行为、保护文明对话方面的应对策略提出见解。

items.title_en: Headway Therapy Patients Forced to Scan Their Faces to Keep Getting Care
items.title_zh: Headway治疗患者被迫扫描脸部以继续治疗
items.summary_en: Privacy concerns arise as Headway Therapy requires facial scans for ongoing care, raising questions about biometric data handling and consent. The piece calls for safer alternatives and stronger data governance in mental-health tech.
items.summary_zh: Headway治疗在持续治疗中要求进行面部扫描，引发对生物识别数据处理和同意的隐私担忧。文章呼吁采用更安全的替代方案并加强心理健康科技的数据治理。

items.title_en: Squares in Squares
items.title_zh: 方块中的方块
items.summary_en: Squares in Squares presents a visual and mathematical exploration of nested squares, blending art with geometry. It shows how simple shapes can create intricate, repeating patterns.
items.summary_zh: 作品将嵌套方块的视觉与数学关系融合，既是艺术也是几何的探索。简单形状也能生成错综复杂的重复图案。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Minicor (YC P26) – Windows desktop automations at scale
items.title_zh: Launch HN：Minicor（YC P26）—大规模的 Windows 桌面自动化
items.summary_en: Minicor, a YC-backed startup, offers scalable Windows desktop automation for enterprises, enabling scripted workflows across large fleets. The launch post highlights how their tooling addresses traditional RPA pain points like reliability, governance, and scale.
items.summary_zh: YC 资本支持的 Minicor 提供面向企业的 Windows 桌面自动化，支持在大规模设备上执行可重复的工作流。其产品定位旨在解决传统机器人流程自动化在可靠性、治理和可扩展性方面的痛点。

items.title_en: Someone used my open source project to phish people
items.title_zh: 有人把我的开源项目用来钓鱼
items.summary_en: The author discloses their open-source project being abused for phishing campaigns, highlighting how openness can enable misuse. The episode emphasizes the need for abuse monitoring, safer defaults, and governance practices to mitigate harm without stifling collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 作者披露其开源项目被用于网络钓鱼，凸显开放生态的滥用风险。事件强调需要加强滥用监控、默认更安全的设计以及治理实践，以防止伤害同时维持协作。

items.title_en: Show HN: Open-source Workspace (mail,docs,spreadsheet,drive) web/iOS
items.title_zh: Show HN：开源的工作区（邮箱、文档、表格、云盘）Web/iOS
items.summary_en: An open-source, self-hosted workspace bundle provides mail, docs, spreadsheets, and drive access on Web and iOS, offering a privacy-respecting alternative to SaaS. The project demonstrates maturity in open productivity stacks and the appeal of local control. It invites consideration of deployment, maintenance, and ecosystem compatibility.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：一个开源、可自托管的工作区，涵盖邮箱、文档、表格和云盘，提供 Web 和 iOS 端访问，作为对传统 SaaS 的隐私友好替代方案。该项目展示了开源生产力栈的成熟度以及对本地控制的吸引力。它引发了对部署、维护和生态兼容性的思考。

items.title_en: Rising seas will swallow New Orleans. People need to start relocating now
items.title_zh: 海平面上升将吞没新奥尔良。现在就该开始迁移
items.summary_en: Rising seas threaten New Orleans, prompting urgency for relocation planning and climate-resilient policy.
items.summary_zh: 海平面上升将吞没新奥尔良，促使尽早开展迁移规划与应对气候风险的政策。文章讨论社区与决策者为应对潜在人口迁移应采取的行动。

items.title_en: How do you build a semiconductor company on something that's free?
items.title_zh: 如何以免费资源打造半导体公司？
items.summary_en: An exploration of open-source silicon business models, showing how startups can monetize through services, IP, and foundry partnerships while embracing freely available designs.
items.summary_zh: 文章探讨开源 silicon 的商业模式，展示初创公司如何通过服务、知识产权和代工伙伴关系实现盈利，同时拥抱自由获取的设计。

items.title_en: We replaced Zendesk
items.title_zh: 我们替换了 Zendesk
items.summary_en: A case study on replacing Zendesk with an alternative helpdesk, detailing migration steps, cost considerations, and user experience adjustments. The post offers practical lessons for teams considering a tech stack overhaul.
items.summary_zh: 分享用替代方案替换 Zendesk 的实战经验，涵盖迁移步骤、成本考量与用户体验调整。为计划进行技术栈改造的团队提供可借鉴的经验。

items.title_en: Show HN: Streambed – Stream Postgres to Iceberg on S3, Supports Postgres Wire
items.title_zh: Show HN：Streambed — 将 Postgres 数据流式传输到 Iceberg（S3），并支持 Postgres Wire
items.summary_en: Streambed is an open-source tool that streams PostgreSQL data into Iceberg on S3, including support for the Postgres wire protocol. It simplifies real-time analytics architectures by enabling seamless data movement from transactional databases to a data lake format.
items.summary_zh: Streambed 是一款开源工具，可将 PostgreSQL 数据流式写入 S3 上的 Iceberg，并支持 Postgres wire 协议。它通过实现从事务数据库到数据湖格式的数据无缝移动，简化了实时分析架构。

items.title_en: Linux/M68k
items.title_zh: Linux/M68k
items.summary_en: Linux on Motorola 68k persists, with ongoing support and ports that keep retro and embedded projects alive. The status offers a window into long-standing open-source maintenance and the value of historical architectures.
items.summary_zh: Linux/M68k 仍在维护，仍有持续的端口和支持，使复古与嵌入式项目得以生存。展现开源维护的坚持以及历史架构的价值。

items.title_en: Security Envelope Pattern collection – S.E.C.R.E.T
items.title_zh: 安全信封模式集合——S.E.C.R.E.T
items.summary_en: Security Envelope Pattern collection – S.E.C.R.E.T is a curated set of security design patterns aiming to better contain and protect data boundaries. It offers practical patterns for reducing data exposure, enforcing strict boundaries, and improving defense-in-depth, with examples and guidance for engineers.
items.summary_zh: 安全信封模式集合——S.E.C.R.E.T 是一组经筛选的安全设计模式，旨在更好地界定并保护数据边界。它提供降低数据暴露、强化边界约束、完善防御深度的实用模式和工程示例。

items.title_en: My new obsession: A horse-racing board game of pure luck
items.title_zh: 我的新痴迷：一款纯靠运气的赛马棋盘游戏
items.summary_en: A new obsession is a horse-racing board game driven entirely by luck, emphasizing social play and tactile components over strategy. It reflects a trend toward lighter, social games that reward quick interaction and shared moments. The game spotlights how accessibility and social dynamics can drive popularity.
items.summary_zh: 我的新痴迷是一款完全靠运气的赛马棋盘游戏，强调社交互动和触感体验，而非复杂策略。这体现了偏向轻量、社交型桌游的趋势，强调快速互动与共享时刻的魅力。

items.title_en: Decades of Effort Restore Steelhead and Salmon Passage on Alameda Creek
items.title_zh: 数十年努力重建阿拉梅达溪的钢头鲑鱼回游通道
items.summary_en: Over decades, agencies and communities removed barriers and restored habitat to reopen steelhead and salmon migrations on California's Alameda Creek. The effort improves biodiversity, supports endangered species recovery, and demonstrates scalable approaches for river restoration.
items.summary_zh: 数十年来，相关机构与社区清除阻碍、修复栖息地，使阿拉梅达溪的钢头鲑和鲑鱼能够重新回游。该工程提升了生物多样性，助力濒危物种恢复，并展示了可扩展的河流修复方法。

items.title_en: Are we self-sovereign PKI yet?
items.title_zh: 我们真的实现了自我主权的 PKI 吗？
items.summary_en: The post surveys progress toward self-sovereign PKI, evaluating how decentralized identifiers, verifiable credentials, and privacy-preserving protocols are shaping trust on the web.
items.summary_zh: 文章评估实现自我主权 PKI 的进展，探讨去中心化标识（DID）、可验证凭证等技术，以及隐私保护协议如何塑造网络上的信任基础。

items.title_en: From Rust to Ruby
items.title_zh: 从 Rust 到 Ruby
items.summary_en: Explores switching from Rust to Ruby in a real project, examining how ergonomics, speed of development, and maintenance trade-offs shape language choice. The piece reflects on when and why teams ferry between systems language and scripting language, and what that means for maintainability and velocity.
items.summary_zh: 文章对比了 Rust 的安全性与高性能与 Ruby 的开发者生产力和表达力，探讨在实际项目中两种语言之间的取舍。作者反思团队在效率、可维护性与性能之间的权衡，以及在不同阶段为何会在两门语言之间切换。

items.title_en: New Beam Spring Keyboards
items.title_zh: 新款 Beam Spring 键盘发布
items.summary_en: Model Keyboards unveils a new Beam Spring keyboard, reviving a classic spring-based switch with modern manufacturing. It targets keyboard enthusiasts seeking a tactile, vintage feel with current PC compatibility and build quality.
items.summary_zh: Model Keyboards 发布新款 Beam Spring 键盘，复兴经典的弹簧开关，结合现代制造工艺，面向追求传统打字手感和与现代电脑兼容性的键盘爱好者。

items.title_en: Algebraic Effects for the Rest of Us
items.title_zh: 面向大众的代数效应入门
items.summary_en: Algebraic effects offer a lightweight, modular way to model side effects without heavy monad boilerplate. The post breaks down the core ideas and shows practical patterns you can try in real projects. It argues they can simplify reasoning about effectful code while remaining expressive.
items.summary_zh: 代数效应提供一种轻量、可组合的方式来建模副作用，减少繁琐的 monad 代码。本文分解了核心思想，给出在实际项目中可以尝试的实用模式。它主张在表达力与简洁性之间取得平衡，使对副作用的代码更易推理。

items.title_en: C64 Basic: Game Map Overhead “Camera View”
items.title_zh: C64 Basic：游戏地图的俯视摄像机视图实现
items.summary_en: The piece demonstrates techniques for implementing an overhead camera view in the C64 BASIC era, including memory layout, scrolling, and tile mapping to render larger maps on limited hardware. It showcases the ingenuity developers used to push retro hardware beyond its limits.
items.summary_zh: 文中展示了在 C64 BASIC 时代实现俯视摄像机视图的技术，包括内存布局、滚动和地图块映射，从而在受限硬件上呈现更大规模的地图，体现了早期开发者如何突破硬件极限的创造力。

items.title_en: Don't put aria-label on generic elements like divs
items.title_zh: 别把 aria-label 放在通用元素上（如 div）
items.summary_en: Accessibility best practice: avoid aria-label on non-semantic elements; prefer meaningful roles or native elements to prevent confusion for assistive tech.
items.summary_zh: 无语义元素上不要使用 aria-label；应改用具备语义的标签或明确的角色，以减少辅助技术的混淆和误用。

items.title_en: HeidiSQL – Lightweight MariaDB, MySQL, SQL Server, PostgreSQL and SQLite Manager
items.title_zh: HeidiSQL：轻量级的跨数据库管理工具
items.summary_en: HeidiSQL is a lightweight GUI for managing multiple databases—MariaDB/MySQL, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, and SQLite—with features like bulk edits, session management, and SSH tunneling. It emphasizes speed and simplicity for quick admin tasks.
items.summary_zh: HeidiSQL 是一款轻量级的跨数据库管理工具，支持 MariaDB/MySQL、SQL Server、PostgreSQL 与 SQLite，具备批量编辑、会话管理和 SSH 隧道等功能，适合快速运维。

items.title_en: SICP Video Lectures (1986)
items.title_zh: SICP 视频讲座（1986）
items.summary_en: SICP Video Lectures (1986) presents Abelson and Sussman’s classic MIT lectures in video form, showcasing fundamental ideas in abstraction and programming with Scheme. The resource remains a foundational influence on many programmers and CS educators.
items.summary_zh: SICP 视频讲座（1986）以视频形式呈现 Abelson 与 Sussman 的经典课程，展示用 Scheme 进行抽象与编程的核心思想。作为计算机科学教育的奠基性资源，它对后来一代程序员和教学方法影响深远。

items.title_en: Design Engineering Magazine
items.title_zh: 设计工程杂志
items.summary_en: A publication focused on the intersection of design and engineering, showcasing interdisciplinary work, case studies, and practical insights for product teams.
items.summary_zh: 设计工程杂志聚焦设计与工程的交叉领域，呈现跨学科案例、实用洞察与产品团队的实践建议。

items.title_en: What It Takes to Preserve Floppy Disks
items.title_zh: 软盘数据的保存之道
items.summary_en: Preserving floppy disks requires treating aging media as a system: hardware readers, disk surface care, and controlled environments. The article outlines concrete steps—imaging, integrity checks, and migration to modern formats or emulation—to safeguard valuable data. It highlights how archives risk irreversible loss without proactive preservation.
items.summary_zh: 软盘是易退化的老旧介质，读取设备也在减少。文章给出可操作的保存步骤：制作磁盘镜像、验证完整性、使用支持旧格式的读盘设备，并将数据迁移到现代存储或仿真方案。若不主动保存，档案中珍贵数据可能永久丢失。

items.title_en: Robinhood now lets your AI agents trade stocks
items.title_zh: Robinhood 现支持让你的 AI 代理交易股票
items.summary_en: Robinhood now enables AI agents to place stock trades, enabling automated strategies on the platform. This raises questions about risk controls, user responsibility, and how to monitor AI-driven trading in consumer apps.
items.summary_zh: Robinhood 现支持让 AI 代理执行股票交易，平台上可部署自动化交易策略。这引发关于风控、用户责任以及在面向消费者的应用中监控 AI 驱动交易的讨论。

items.title_en: Werner Herzog in conversation with Paul Cronin (2014)
items.title_zh: 沃纳·赫斯特与保罗·克罗宁的对谈（2014）
items.summary_en: A 2014 conversation between visionary filmmaker Werner Herzog and photographer Paul Cronin offers rare insights into their creative processes, ethics, and how they perceive cinema. The transcript reads like a masterclass on art, memory, and the responsibilities of documentary storytelling.
items.summary_zh: 这段 2014 年的对谈汇集了导演维尔纳·赫斯特与摄影师保罗·克罗宁，对其创作流程、伦理观以及对电影的看法提供珍贵洞见。对话宛如关于艺术、记忆与纪实叙事责任的现场讲座。

items.title_en: The Lone Lisp Heap
items.title_zh: 孤独的 Lisp 堆
items.summary_en: An exploration of Lisp's memory model, focusing on the heap and how garbage collection interacts with Lisp-era features like macros. The piece links heap design choices to performance and language implementation challenges.
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨 Lisp 的内存模型，聚焦堆结构及其与宏等语言特性的垃圾回收关系。将堆设计选择与性能与实现挑战联系起来，提供对实现者的洞见。

items.title_en: On Labubu and the Hyperreal
items.title_zh: 谈 Labubu 与超现实
items.summary_en: Explores Labubu in relation to the hyperreal, examining how digital abstractions shape perception and meaning today.
items.summary_zh: 探讨 Labubu 与超现实之间的关系，审视数字抽象如何塑造当代的感知与意义。

items.title_en: US's big bet on quantum computing may not be legal
items.title_zh: 美国在量子计算上的重大赌注可能并不完全合法
items.summary_en: The piece questions whether the US's ambitious quantum computing investments align with existing laws and procurement rules. It highlights potential legal and regulatory frictions as policymakers push for rapid tech gains, which could affect timelines and funding.
items.summary_zh: 文章质疑美国在量子计算领域的高额投入是否符合现有法律和采购规则。揭示在推动快速技术突破的过程中可能遇到的法律与监管冲突，影响时间表与资金安排。

items.title_en: Noroboto: Lying Fonts and Mitigation in Rust
items.title_zh: Noroboto：伪造字体及 Rust 的缓解措施
items.summary_en: Noroboto demonstrates how font files can lie about glyphs or metrics, creating security and usability risks in text rendering. The Rust implementation highlights safer parsers and mitigations to reduce memory-safety bugs and exploitation surface in font handling.
items.summary_zh: Noroboto 展示了字体文件如何在字形或度量方面作假，可能对文本渲染的安全和可用性造成风险。基于 Rust 的实现强调更安全的解析器和缓解措施，降低字体处理中的内存安全漏洞和利用面。

items.title_en: Rapira (Рапира) – Soviet programming language interpreter
items.title_zh: Rapira（Рапира）——苏联时期的编程语言解释器
items.summary_en: Rapira, a Soviet-era interpreter for a programming language, offers a window into early computing culture and language implementation. The project highlights how past constraints shaped design ideas that influenced later practices.
items.summary_zh: Rapira 是苏联时期的一个编程语言解释器，提供了了解早期计算文化与语言实现的窗口。该项目揭示了历史条件如何塑造设计思路，并影响后来的编程实践。

items.title_en: Local Git remotes
items.title_zh: 本地 Git 远端
items.summary_en: A practical guide to managing local git remotes, enabling offline workflows and seamless collaboration when central servers are unavailable or restricted.
items.summary_zh: 提供本地 Git 远端的实用指南，帮助在离线或中心服务器不可用时维持协作与工作流的连贯性。

items.title_en: Swap tables, flash-friendly swap, swap_ops, and more
items.title_zh: 交换表、面向闪存的交换、swap_ops 等
items.summary_en: A look at kernel-level swap innovations including swap tables, flash-friendly swap, and swap_ops, aimed at improving paging performance on modern storage devices. The notes discuss how these features help latency and endurance in systems with large memory pressure.
items.summary_zh: 本文概述内核层面的若干交换机制创新，包括交换表、面向闪存的交换和 swap_ops，旨在改善对现代存储设备的分页性能。介绍这些特性如何帮助降低延迟、提升在大内存压力场景下的耐久性和效率。

items.title_en: Modern Blu-ray drives can now rip GameCube, Wii, and Xbox 360 games to PC
items.title_zh: 现代蓝光驱动现在可在特定固件下将 GameCube、Wii 与 Xbox 360 光盘提取为 PC 可用的数字镜像
items.summary_en: Modern Blu-ray drives, with third-party firmware, can rip GameCube, Wii, and Xbox 360 games from physical discs to PC. This enables preservation and nostalgia-driven emulation, though it raises legal and copyright considerations that vary by jurisdiction.
items.summary_zh: 在特定固件支持下，现代蓝光驱动现已能够将 GameCube、Wii 与 Xbox 360 的实体光盘提取为可在 PC 上使用的数字镜像，方便游戏保存与复古模拟。此类做法虽带来收藏与兼容性便利，但在不同法域下的版权与法律风险需仔细权衡。

items.title_en: Incident with Actions and Pages
items.title_zh: Actions 与 Pages 的事件进展
items.summary_en: GitHub is investigating an outage affecting Actions and Pages, with users experiencing failed workflows and inaccessible sites; the incident highlights the fragility of cloud-native CI/CD and the importance of resilience.
items.summary_zh: GitHub 正在调查影响 Actions 和 Pages 的故障，用户报告工作流失败、站点不可用。这一事件凸显了云原生 CI/CD 的脆弱性及韧性的重要性。

items.title_en: 2026 HIPAA Security Rule Update
items.title_zh: 2026 年 HIPAA 安全规则更新
items.summary_en: HIPAA's 2026 update tightens cloud and data-security expectations for covered entities and business associates, likely expanding encryption, access controls, and incident response requirements. The change will ripple through healthcare vendors, EHRs, and health-tech startups as they align with stricter PHI protections.
items.summary_zh: 2026 年的 HIPAA 安全规则更新将加强对云端和受保护健康信息的保护要求，涉及加密、访问控制和事件响应等方面。這将波及医疗信息系统、电子病历系统和健康科技初创企业，推动合规升级。

items.title_en: Show HN: Zot – Yet another coding agent harness
items.title_zh: Show HN：Zot——又一个编码代理框架
items.summary_en: Zot is an open-source framework to build coding agents, aiming to simplify integrating agents with editors and runtimes. It focuses on speed, portability, and a practical workflow for creating AI copilots that can edit code, run tests, and fetch docs.
items.summary_zh: Zot 是一个开源框架，用于构建代码代理，旨在简化代理与编辑器、运行时的对接。它强调快速、可移植，以及便于创建能够编辑代码、运行测试、获取文档的 AI 助手的工作流。

items.title_en: Seeing Around Corners Using Smartphone-Grade Lidar
items.title_zh: 通过手机级激光雷达看见拐角处
items.summary_en: Smartphone-grade LiDAR experiments show you can infer geometry beyond line-of-sight by analyzing reflections and timing. The technique has implications for robotics, AR, and privacy, enabling new sensing capabilities while raising safety concerns.
items.summary_zh: 通过手机级激光雷达的实验，展示通过分析反射和时间信息可以在视线外推断几何形状。这一技术对机器人、增强现实等领域意义重大，同时也带来隐私与安全方面的担忧。

items.title_en: Show HN: OpenBrief – Local-first video downloader/summarizer
items.title_zh: Show HN：OpenBrief——本地优先的视频下载与摘要工具
items.summary_en: OpenBrief is a Show HN project: a local-first video downloader and summarizer, prioritizing privacy and offline operation.
items.summary_zh: OpenBrief 是一个 Show HN 项目，主打本地优先的视频下载与摘要，强调隐私与离线使用。

items.title_en: Splinter Cell veteran says realistic modern lighting has screwed up stealth game
items.title_zh: 《潜龙谍影》资深玩家：现实照明破坏潜行游戏
items.summary_en: A Splinter Cell veteran argues that modern lighting realism makes it nearly impossible to distinguish light, shadow, and safe paths, breaking classic stealth cues. This critique highlights the tension between photoreal visuals and clear gameplay signals, suggesting designers may need stronger visual rules or scripted stealth to preserve tension.
items.summary_zh: 这名《潜龙谍影》资深玩家认为当代光照的真实感让玩家难以分辨光线、阴影与安全区，削弱了潜行设计的清晰度。此观点凸显了写实光照与游戏性之间的矛盾，可能促使开发者在视觉语言上做出更明确的规则或采用更强的剧情化潜行判定来维持紧张感。

items.title_en: Show HN: Ktx – Open-source executable context layer for data agents
items.title_zh: Show HN: Ktx – 面向数据代理的开源可执行上下文层
items.summary_en: Ktx introduces an open-source executable context layer for data agents, enabling agents to carry executable context across tasks and environments. By formalizing context handling, it aims to simplify building autonomous data workflows and improve reproducibility.
items.summary_zh: Ktx 是一个面向数据代理的开源可执行上下文层，能在任务与环境之间携带可执行上下文。通过对上下文处理的标准化，旨在简化自驱动数据工作流的构建并提升可重复性。

items.title_en: EV Stupidity Checklist
items.title_zh: 电动汽车愚蠢清单
items.summary_en: A tongue-in-cheek checklist of common EV design flaws and questionable decisions. It invites readers to scrutinize EV UX, software, and safety trade-offs.
