items.summary_zh: 这是一份对电动汽车常见设计缺陷与可疑选择的讽刺性清单，促使读者审视电动车的用户体验、软件与安全取舍。

items.title_en: Re: [PATCH] OOM_pardon, a.k.a. don't kill my xlock (2004)
items.title_zh: 关于 OOM_pardon：请别把我的 xlock 杀死
items.summary_en: A patch discussion centers on protecting a specific process (xlock) from the Linux OOM killer, highlighting the tension between memory pressure and critical user-facing tasks. The change could improve stability for screensavers or lock screens but may shift memory pressure to other processes.
items.summary_zh: 这篇补丁讨论聚焦于在内存不足时保护特定进程（xlock）不被 OOM killer 终止，凸显内存压力和关键用户任务之间的矛盾。该改动可能提升锁屏/屏幕保护程序的稳定性，但也可能把内存压力挪给其他进程。

items.title_en: CAPTCHAs can still detect AI agents
items.title_zh: 验证码仍能识别AI代理
items.summary_en: Recent work shows CAPTCHA defenses still catch AI-driven bots, underscoring that bot-avoidance remains imperfect and that layered security—like behavior analytics and risk-based checks—remains important. The result nudges defenders toward multi-layered verification strategies.
items.summary_zh: 最新研究表明验证码仍能区分人类与AI代理，说明绕过防护的能力仍有限，需要通过行为分析、风险评估等多层次验证来提升安全性。

items.title_en: Where are the economies of scale in homebuilding?
items.title_zh: 住宅建筑中的规模经济在哪里？
items.summary_en: The post questions where true economies of scale lie in homebuilding, arguing that mass production may reduce some costs but also introduce inefficiencies due to customization and local constraints. It outlines paths like modular construction, standardized specs, and design repeatability to improve cost efficiency.
items.summary_zh: 文章质疑住宅建筑中的真正规模经济所在，指出尽管大规模生产可能降低部分成本，但定制化和地区差异也会带来低效。提出通过模块化建造、标准化规格和可重复的设计来提升成本效益的途径。

items.title_en: Using Tailscale with an OrbStack VM on macOS
items.title_zh: 在 macOS 的 OrbStack 虚拟机中使用 Tailscale
items.summary_en: Tutorial on running Tailscale inside a macOS VM managed by OrbStack, covering networking quirks, IP routing considerations, and how to reach host services from the guest.
items.summary_zh: 给出在 OrbStack 管理的 macOS 虚拟机中使用 Tailscale 的步骤，讨论网络路由、IP 分配等要点，以及如何从虚拟机访问宿主机资源。

items.title_en: Associative learning turns DEET from aversive to appetitive in Aedes aegypti
items.title_zh: 联结学习将 DEET 在埃及伊蚊身上的效价从厌恶转为偏好
items.summary_en: Associative learning can flip DEET's valence from aversive to appetitive in Aedes aegypti, showing that learned associations can override innate repellents. This has implications for vector control, challenging assumptions about repellents and guiding the development of new strategies that account for learned behavior. It also informs how researchers design mosquito behavioral assays and evaluate repellents.
items.summary_zh: 联结学习可以使埃及伊蚊对 DEET 的反应从排斢转为偏好，表明学习联结可覆盖先天驱避。 这一发现对害虫控制具有意义，挑战了对驱避剂的常规假设，并为开发考虑学习行为的新策略提供方向。 研究还将影响研究者在设计蚊虫行为实验和评估驱避剂时的做法。

items.title_en: The Kaiser and a "Mediocre Man" Theory of History
items.title_zh: 凯撒与“平庸男人”的历史理论
items.summary_en: A provocative take on history arguing that leadership quality alone isn't decisive; instead mediocre men or systemic factors can shape outcomes, challenging heroic narratives. The piece uses historical case studies to illustrate this theory.
items.summary_zh: 关于历史论述的一种观点：领导者并非史事走向的唯一决定因素，普通人与制度因素往往也起作用，挑战英雄叙事。通过历史实例来论证。

items.title_en: The Steinwinter Supercargo
items.title_zh: 斯坦温特超货车
items.summary_en: Steinwinter’s Supercargo is a forgotten road vehicle that stands apart from today’s mainstream designs. The piece uses it to illustrate how unusual engineering choices can leave a lasting, if niche, imprint on automotive history.
items.summary_zh: 斯坦温特超货车是如今已被遗忘的道路车辆，与当代主流设计截然不同。本文借它揭示了非常规工程决策如何在汽车史中留下独特而深刻的印记。

items.title_en: Show HN: Open-Source AI Racing Harness
items.title_zh: 展示：开源 AI 赛车对接框架
items.summary_en: An open-source harness for running AI agents in racing simulations, providing standard interfaces, telemetry logging and tooling to evaluate control policies consistently. It aims to lower the friction for benchmarking autonomous-driving agents and enable reproducible competitions and research comparisons.
items.summary_zh: 一个开源对接框架，用于在赛车仿真中运行 AI 代理，提供统一接口、遥测记录和评估工具以实现一致的控制策略测试。它旨在降低基准测试自动驾驶代理的门槛，支持可复现的竞赛与研究比较。

items.title_en: Zero Lines Maze: What the 8-Bit Guy's One-Liner Can Still Teach Us
items.title_zh: 零行迷宫：从 8-Bit Guy 的一行代码学到的东西
items.summary_en: A deep dive into an 8-bit-era one-liner that generates a maze, extracting lessons about clever encoding, minimal state machines and the power of constraints in programming. The write-up shows how tight resource budgets force elegant algorithms and why those techniques still matter for teaching and demo coding today.
items.summary_zh: 解析一段 8 位机时代的“一行代码”迷宫生成器，从中提炼出编码巧思、极简状态机和约束下的创造力。文章表明资源受限如何催生优雅算法，这些技巧在教学和演示式编程中依然有价值。

items.title_en: Xiaomi MiMo-v2.5 Series API Permanent Price Reduction Up to 99%
items.title_zh: 小米 MiMo-v2.5 系列 API 价格永久下调高达99%
items.summary_en: Xiaomi permanently reduces prices for the MiMo-v2.5 Series API by up to 99%, signaling a push to broaden adoption of its IoT modules. The steep discount could accelerate integration in developer projects and bolster ecosystem growth.
items.summary_zh: 小米对 MiMo-v2.5 系列 API 实施永久性降价，降幅最高达99%，显示其在推动物联网模组的普及。降价可能加速开发者项目中的接入并促进生态体系的扩展。

items.title_en: A Probabilistic Algorithm for Repairing All Roads in Lebanon via Papal Visits (2025)
items.title_zh: 一种通过教皇访问来修复黎巴嫩所有道路的概率性算法（2025）
items.summary_en: A humorous SIGBOVIK paper proposes a probabilistic algorithm to repair all roads in Lebanon via papal visits, using a playful thought experiment to illustrate algorithmic ideas. It serves as a tongue-in-cheek reminder of the quirks of academic publishing and optimization humor.
items.summary_zh: SIGBOVIK 的一篇幽默论文提出通过教皇访问来修复黎巴嫩的所有道路的概率算法，作为对算法思想的玩笑性演示。它也让人一窥学术发表与优化研究中的趣味与荒诞。

items.title_en: Selling SaaS in Germany
items.title_zh: 在德国销售SaaS（SaaS销售于德国）
items.summary_en: A practical guide to selling SaaS in the DACH region, covering GDPR compliance, VAT, localization, and customer support expectations. It highlights regulatory differences across Germany, Austria, and Switzerland and offers steps to enter the market with pricing, contracting, and trust-building strategies.
items.summary_zh: 面向在德语区销售 SaaS 的实用指南，涵盖 GDPR 合规、增值税、本地化和客户支持等要点。指出德国、奥地利和瑞士之间的监管差异，并给出定价、合同与建立信任的市场进入策略。

items.title_en: Interleaved Deltas
items.title_zh: 交错增量编码
items.summary_en: Explores a data encoding technique called interleaved deltas, which interleaves small delta differences to improve compression and data locality in memory-mapped contexts. The approach can boost efficiency for time-series or indexed data.
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍一种名为“交错增量”的数据编码技巧，通过把增量差分交错排列来提升压缩效率和内存局部性，尤其适合处理时间序列或索引数据时的带宽和缓存效率。

items.title_en: Show HN: Posthorn, self-hosted mail gateway
items.title_zh: Show HN：Posthorn，自托管邮件网关
items.summary_en: Posthorn is a self-hosted mail gateway project aimed at simplifying mail routing, spam filtering, and self-hosted email infrastructure. It demonstrates the appeal of self-managed email flows amidst ongoing concerns about privacy and data residency. The project invites evaluation for teams seeking control and configurability.
items.summary_zh: Posthorn 是一个自托管邮件网关项目，目标是简化邮件路由、垃圾邮件过滤以及自托管的邮件基础设施。它体现了在隐私与数据驻留持续受关切的背景下，对自管邮件流的吸引力。该项目适合寻求控制权与可配置性的团队进行评估。

items.title_en: TSDuck: Open-source toolkit for MPEG-TS analysis and manipulation
items.title_zh: TSDuck：用于 MPEG-TS 分析与处理的开源工具包
items.summary_en: Introduces TSDuck, an open-source toolkit for analyzing and manipulating MPEG-TS streams, useful for broadcasters, streaming services, and automated testing workflows.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 TSDuck，这是一个用于分析和处理 MPEG-TS 流的开源工具包，适用于广播、流媒体和自动化测试工作流。

items.title_en: Everyone Against Us (2023)
items.title_zh: Everyone Against Us（2023）
items.summary_en: A 2023 Chicago Magazine feature about facing broad opposition.
items.summary_zh: 2023 年《Chicago Magazine》的一篇特写，讲述了一段遭遇广泛反对的故事。

items.title_en: LAN-LOK: The Antarctic DOS Sabotage Game Lost for 34 Years
items.title_zh: LAN-LOK：34 年来在南极遗失的 DOS 游戏
items.summary_en: LAN-LOK recounts a DOS-era sabotage game that vanished in the Antarctic for 34 years and was recently rediscovered. The story highlights archival challenges and the quirky ways digital culture persists, even in extreme environments.
items.summary_zh: LAN-LOK是一段在南极消失34年的 DOS 时代对抗性游戏的故事，最近才被重新发现。该案例揭示了档案保存的挑战，以及极端环境下数字文化依然持续的趣味现象。

items.title_en: Atherton spent $145K to delay train electrification. The rest of us paid $400M
items.title_zh: 阿瑟顿花费14.5万美元拖延 Caltrain 电气化，其余人却花4亿美元
items.summary_en: Atherton spent $145k in legal actions to delay Caltrain electrification, while the broader project cost taxpayers $400M and added years to the timeline. This case illustrates how local opposition can push infrastructure costs onto the public, affecting commuters and regional planning. For tech readers, it highlights governance and policy friction that directly shapes transit tech deployments.
items.summary_zh: 阿瑟顿以14.5万美元的诉讼费拖延 Caltrain 电气化项目，而全局成本却让纳税人多付4亿美元并延迟数年。这件事揭示了地方阻挠如何把基础设施成本推给公众，影响通勤与区域规划。对科技读者而言，这是一次关于治理与政策摩擦如何影响交通技术部署的警示。

items.title_en: Letter from the Duke of Wellington to the British Foreign Office (1809)
items.title_zh: 威灵顿公爵给英国外交部的信（1809）
items.summary_en: Publication of a 1809 letter from the Duke of Wellington to the British Foreign Office reveals contemporary diplomacy, military coordination, and strategic thinking during the Napoleonic era.
items.summary_zh: 公布的 1809 年威灵顿公爵给英国外交部的信件，揭示了拿破仑战争时期的外交、军事协调与战略思想。

items.title_en: Garnix (A Nix CI) is shutting down
items.title_zh: Garnix（一个 Nix CI）将关停
items.summary_en: Garnix, a CI tool built around the Nix package manager, is shutting down. The closure affects developers relying on reproducible Nix-based pipelines and pushes the community to migrate to alternative CI strategies or fork projects.
items.summary_zh: 基于 Nix 的 CI 工具 Garnix 正式宣布停止运营。该关闭影响依赖可重复 Nix 构建管线的开发者，迫使社区转向替代方案或社区分叉来维持持续集成。

items.title_en: Ember.js 7.0
items.title_zh: Ember.js 7.0 发布
items.summary_en: Ember.js 7.0 brings modernized APIs, improved DX, and deprecations to help apps migrate and maintain long-term projects. The release signals Ember's continuing evolution toward leaner runtimes and better ergonomics for developers.
items.summary_zh: Ember.js 7.0 带来现代化 API、改进的开发体验，并对部分功能进行弃用以促进迁移。此版本显示 Ember 在向更轻量的运行时与更好开发体验进化。

items.title_en: What Gets Kept
items.title_zh: 被珍藏的是什么
items.summary_en: Examines how archivists decide what to keep, using Kerouac as a touchstone to discuss the tension between spontaneity and preservation. The piece considers how digital archiving will shape what about authors and their work survives for future readers.
items.summary_zh: 讨论档案学在选择保留什么时的权衡，以凯鲁亚克为例探讨自发性与保存之间的张力。文章还思考数字化存档将如何影响未来读者对作者及其作品的留存与理解。

items.title_en: Ripgrep AI Policy
items.title_zh: Ripgrep 的 AI 使用政策
items.summary_en: A concise policy laying out acceptable AI-related uses of the ripgrep codebase—covering whether contributors may use models to generate code, restrictions on training models with repository contents, and expectations for attribution and license compliance. It reflects a growing trend of projects setting explicit rules to balance productivity gains from AI tools with legal and ethical responsibilities.
items.summary_zh: 一份简明的政策说明了对 ripgrep 代码库使用 AI 的可接受方式，包括是否允许用模型生成代码、用仓库内容训练模型的限制，以及对归属与许可合规的要求。该政策体现了越来越多项目在权衡 AI 工具带来的效率与法律伦理责任时制定明确规则的趋势。

items.title_en: Shift from a leader-follower to a leader-leader approach
items.title_zh: 从领导-追随者到领导-领导的转变
items.summary_en: Shift from a leader-follower to a leader-leader approach
items.summary_zh: 作者提出企业应从传统的领导-追随结构转向领导-领导的协作模式，强调共同决策、跨团队 mentorship 与快速适应能力的提升，并给出实现路径与注意要点。

items.title_en: Show HN: I made an emergency page for my family
items.title_zh: Show HN：我为家人做了一个紧急信息页
items.summary_en: A personal project creating an emergency page to share statuses and guidance with family during crises, demonstrating a lightweight resilience tool for real-world scenarios. It underscores how simple web apps can improve communication under stress. The approach may inspire similar family-safe, offline-capable designs.
items.summary_zh: 一个个人项目，为家人在危机时刻分享状态与指引而开发的紧急信息页，展示了一种用于现实情景的轻量级韧性工具。它强调简单的网页应用在压力情境下改善沟通的作用。此设计或可启发家人友好且离线可用的类似方案。

items.title_en: Eagle 3.1: Collaboration Between the EAGLE Team, vLLM Team, and TorchSpec Team
items.title_zh: Eagle 3.1：EAGLE 团队、vLLM 团队与 TorchSpec 团队的协作
items.summary_en: Eagle 3.1 marks a coordinated effort among EAGLE, vLLM, and TorchSpec to optimize large-language-model inference tooling, with improvements in model serving, scheduling, and interoperability.
items.summary_zh: Eagle 3.1 是 EAGLE、vLLM 与 TorchSpec 三方协作的里程碑，聚焦提升大模型推理工具链的性能与互操作性，包括服务端部署、调度和模型兼容性方面的改进。

items.title_en: Creusot helps you prove your Rust code is correct
items.title_zh: Creusot 帮助你证明 Rust 代码的正确性
items.summary_en: Creusot provides Rust formal verification tooling to prove code correctness, enabling stronger guarantees for safety-critical software. The project demonstrates how automated proofs complement testing, potentially reducing bugs in critical systems.
items.summary_zh: Creusot 提供 Rust 的形式化验证工具，帮助证明代码正确性，为关键软件提供更强的安全保障。此类自动证明与测试互为补充，可能降低关键系统中的漏洞数量。

items.title_en: The Green Side of the Lua
items.title_zh: Lua 的绿色一面：能效与环境影响
items.summary_en: The paper examines energy efficiency and environmental impact of Lua and its lightweight runtime. It discusses methods for measuring energy use in scripting environments and what it means for energy-aware software.
items.summary_zh: 文章探讨了 Lua 及其轻量化运行时的能耗与环境影响，介绍在脚本环境中衡量能耗的方法以及对能源感知软件的含义。

items.title_en: The Structural Barriers to AI Lawyers
items.title_zh: AI 律师的结构性障碍
items.summary_en: Identifies non-technical barriers to deploying AI in the legal field—regulatory, procedural, and professional norms—and calls for policy and process reforms to unlock AI's potential.
items.summary_zh: 指出在法律领域部署 AI 面临的结构性障碍（监管、流程与专业规范等非技术因素），并提出改革路径以释放 AI 的潜力。

items.title_en: Show HN: Geomatic – A command-driven geometry studio enabled with autodiff
items.title_zh: Show HN: Geomatic——一个具自动微分能力的命令驱动几何工作室
items.summary_en: Geomatic is a command-driven geometry studio that integrates automatic differentiation. It enables gradient-based optimization and analysis directly on geometric problems, appealing to researchers and engineers in robotics, CAD, and differentiable geometry. The project signals how autodiff tooling is bleeding into domain-specific workbenches.
items.summary_zh: Geomatic 是一个命令驱动的几何工作室，内置自动微分能力，使得在几何问题上可以直接进行梯度优化和分析。它对机器人、计算机辅助设计以及可微分几何领域的研究人员和工程师尤具吸引力。该项目体现了自动微分工具正在向领域专用工作台渗透的趋势。

items.title_en: FROST: Fingerprinting Remotely using OPFS-based SSD Timing [pdf]
items.title_zh: FROST：基于 OPFS 的 SSD 时序可进行远程指纹识别
items.summary_en: FROST presents a method to fingerprint devices remotely by analyzing SSD timing via the File System Access API (OPFS), revealing a novel web-side channel risk. Defenses include reducing timing leakage and restricting access to low-level IO.
items.summary_zh: FROST 提出通过 OPFS 的 SSD 时序实现对设备的远程指纹识别，揭示一种新的网页侧信道风险。防御包括降低时序泄露和限制对底层 IO 的访问。

items.title_en: Getting an old Computer online with Android Ethernet tethering
items.title_zh: 用 Android 以太网共享让旧电脑上网
items.summary_en: An accessible guide shows how to bring an older computer online by using Android’s Ethernet tethering, turning a smartphone into a network gateway. It highlights low-cost ways to repurpose aging hardware and keep it useful in today’s networked world.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章演示了如何利用 Android 的以太网共享功能让一台老旧电脑接入互联网，将手机变成网络网关。强调低成本重用老设备、在当今网络环境中继续保持实用性。

items.title_en: Curly braces: An evolution of Unix and C
items.title_zh: Curly braces：Unix 与 C 的演变
items.summary_en: Curly braces trace how block syntax influenced Unix tooling and C evolution, from early formatting choices to modern coding standards. The piece ties brace usage to scope management, macro behavior, and portability decisions across systems.
items.summary_zh: Curly braces 记录了大括号语法在 Unix 工具链和 C 语言演进中的作用，从早期格式化选择到现代编码规范。文章将大括号的使用与作用域管理、宏行为以及跨系统可移植性的决策联系起来。

items.title_en: XLIDE: VBA without excel
items.title_zh: XLIDE：无需 Excel 即可使用 VBA
items.summary_en: XLIDE lets you author and run VBA code outside Excel, offering a path to automate or port macros in alternative toolchains. It opens opportunities for teams with VBA-heavy workflows to reduce Excel licensing friction. The project signals a broader trend toward decoupling legacy automation from spreadsheets.
items.summary_zh: XLIDE 允许在不依赖 Excel 的情况下编写和运行 VBA 代码，为在替代工具链中自动化或迁移宏提供了新途径。它为大量使用 VBA 的团队减少了对 Excel 许可的依赖，体现了将遗留自动化与表格应用解耦的趋势。

items.title_en: IBM Confidential: System/360 File Organization [video]
items.title_zh: IBM Confidential：System/360 文件组织（视频）
items.summary_en: A historical video about IBM System/360 file organization, covering record formats, addressing, and data layout decisions that influenced early mainframe software design.
items.summary_zh: 这段关于 System/360 的文件组织的历史视频，介绍了记录格式、寻址方式和当时对数据组织的设计决策。内容帮助理解早期主机软件设计的原则，并影响后续体系结构的演进。

items.title_en: About LLMs at Zig Days
items.title_zh: Zig Days 上的大语言模型
items.summary_en: At Zig Days, the discussion covers how large language models intersect with the Zig community, including tooling, performance, and safety considerations for language-model-assisted development. The post shares practical takeaways for engineers exploring AI in the Rust/Zig ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: 在 Zig Days 会议上，讨论了大语言模型与 Zig 社区的耦合方式、工具链、性能与安全等议题，并给出在 Rust/Zig 生态中探索 AI 的实践要点。

items.title_en: Declassified CIA Cartography Maps from the 1980s
items.title_zh: 1980 年代解密的 CIA 制图地图
items.summary_en: Declassified CIA maps from the 1980s reveal Cold War geospatial intelligence and mapmaking practices, illustrating how visual data supported policy and military planning. The release offers a historical lens on data visualization, cartography trends, and information security practices of the era.
items.summary_zh: 解密的 1980 年代 CIA 制图地图揭示了冷战时期的地理情报与制图实践，显示可视化数据如何为政策与军事规划提供支持。这一公开资料为数据可视化、制图趋势与当时的信息安全实践提供了历史视角。

items.title_en: US healthcare still stupidly expensive, with pathetic outcomes, study finds
items.title_zh: 美国医疗依然价格昂贵且效果不佳：研究发现
items.summary_en: A study confirms that US healthcare remains exorbitantly expensive with disappointing outcomes, underscoring systemic inefficiencies and price opacity. The findings push policymakers and health-tech developers to rethink pricing, access, and value metrics.
items.summary_zh: 研究证实美国医疗仍然价格高昂、效果不理想，暴露系统性低效与价格透明度不足的问题。这一发现促使政策制定者和健康科技开发者重新考量定价、可及性和价值评估。

items.title_en: Microsoft data suggests using AI is more expensive than hiring people
items.title_zh: 微软数据表明，使用 AI 的成本高于雇佣人力
items.summary_en: Microsoft data shows that integrating AI into workflows can be more expensive than hiring staff, once you account for licensing, infrastructure, and model usage costs. The takeaway is that AI is not a free upgrade and ROI depends on use-case, scale, and efficiency; budgeting is key.
items.summary_zh: 微软的数据显示，将 AI 融入工作流在 licensing、基础设施与模型使用成本等方面的支出，可能高于雇佣员工。结论是 AI 不是免费的升级，投资回报取决于用例、规模与效率，需要谨慎预算。

items.title_en: Math-to-Manim
items.title_zh: Math-to-Manim：将数学转为 Manim 动画的工具
items.summary_en: Math-to-Manim is a translator that converts mathematical expressions into executable Manim animations, lowering the barrier to creating educational visuals. By automating boilerplate, it lets teachers and developers focus on ideas rather than syntax.
items.summary_zh: Math-to-Manim 是一款将数学表达式直接转化为 Manim 动画的工具，降低制作教育性视觉内容的门槛。它自动处理重复性代码，让教师和开发者更专注于创意，而不是语法细节。

items.title_en: The VibeSec Reckoning
items.title_zh: VibeSec 的清算：关于情感驱动的安全文化的反思
items.summary_en: Martin Fowler’s VibeSec Reckoning critiques security discourse that leans on vibes and culture, urging more concrete risk-based practices. It pushes for measurable outcomes, better engineering discipline, and transparent security metrics. The piece challenges teams to move beyond mood-driven narratives.
items.summary_zh: Martin Fowler 的 VibeSec 清算批评了过于依赖情感与文化的安全话语，呼吁采用更明确的风险导向做法。它推动可衡量结果、更加严格的工程纪律与透明的安全指标。该文促使团队超越情绪驱动的叙事走向实质性安全实践。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Chert (YC P26) – Twilio for iMessage
items.title_zh: Launch HN: Chert（YC P26）—— iMessage 的 Twilio
items.summary_en: Chert aims to offer a developer-friendly API layer on top of iMessage, letting apps send and receive messages with familiar tooling. As a YC alum project, it highlights a push to unlock programmatic iMessage workflows, which could reshape customer engagement for iOS ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: Chert 旨在在 iMessage 之上提供开发者友好的 API，支持应用发送接收信息。作为 YC P26 的出身项目，它折射出让 iMessage 工作流可编程化的趋势，可能改变在 iOS 生态中的客户互动方式。

items.title_en: Dehydration's role in learning and memory
items.title_zh: 脱水对学习与记忆的作用
items.summary_en: Hydration levels influence cognitive performance, including attention, learning, and memory consolidation. Even mild dehydration can impair recall and information retention, highlighting hydration as a simple factor that can boost or hinder study outcomes.
items.summary_zh: 水分摄入水平对认知表现有显著影响，涉及注意力、学习以及记忆巩固等方面。即使是轻度脱水也可能削弱回忆与信息留存，这把简单的因素置于学习成效的核心地位。

items.title_en: Digital Identity Management in Norway Is a Catastrophe
items.title_zh: 挪威的数字身份管理是一场灾难
items.summary_en: Critique of Norway's digital identity management, focusing on privacy, usability, and security concerns, and calling for user-centric redesign and policy fixes.
items.summary_zh: 批评挪威的数字身份管理在隐私、可用性和安全方面的问题，呼吁以用户为中心的重新设计与政策修订。

items.title_en: Theseus: Translating Win32 to WASM
items.title_zh: Theseus：将 Win32 转译为 WASM
items.summary_en: Theseus aims to translate Win32 binaries into WebAssembly, enabling legacy Windows applications to run in the browser or on non-Windows runtimes. The approach showcases WASM as a portability layer with potential for reducing platform lock-in, though real-world viability remains to be seen. It highlights ongoing efforts to bridge desktop software to the web.
items.summary_zh: Theseus 旨在将 Win32 二进制转换为 WebAssembly，使传统 Windows 应用能够在浏览器或非 Windows 的运行时中运行。该思路展示了 WASM 作为跨平台层的潜力，可能降低对特定平台的依赖，但实际落地的可行性仍待观察，反映出将桌面软件桥接到网页的持续努力。

items.title_en: What it takes to transpose a matrix
items.title_zh: 矩阵转置需要做什么
items.summary_en: A practical guide to matrix transposition explains common algorithms, edge cases, and memory considerations. The guide distills core ideas useful for applying linear algebra in code.
items.summary_zh: 文章从实用角度讲解矩阵转置的常用算法、边界情况与内存布局的考量，帮助在代码中落地线性代数的核心思路。

items.title_en: Separate the Cord from the Device
items.title_zh: 把线缆与设备分离
items.summary_en: Decoupling cords from devices can simplify setups, extend device life, and enable easier upgrades. The post weighs wireless and modular options and offers practical tips for a cleaner, more flexible workspace.
items.summary_zh: 将线缆与设备分离可以简化布线、延长设备寿命，并便于升级。文中比较了无线与模块化方案，并给出实现更清爽、灵活工作区的实用建议。

items.title_en: An Obsessive Focus on UX: Pilot's Pressure-Regulating Kire-Na Highlighter
items.title_zh: 对UX的执着：飞行员专用的Kire-Na压力调节高亮笔
items.summary_en: A design-focused piece showing how intense UX work can drive real-world tools, using a pilot-targeted pressure-regulating highlighter as a case study in reducing cognitive load and error.
items.summary_zh: 通过一个面向飞行员的压力调节高亮笔案例，展示深度关注用户体验如何降低认知负担并减少错误，强调UX在专业工具中的价值。

items.title_en: Atomically precise mechanosynthesis of carbon structures on hydrogenated Silicon
items.title_zh: 在氢化硅上进行原子级精确的碳结构机械合成
items.summary_en: A study demonstrates atomically precise mechanosynthesis of carbon nanostructures on hydrogenated silicon, hinting at integration opportunities between carbon nanomaterials and silicon electronics. This advances nanoscale fabrication concepts with potential device-level implications. The result pushes toward new materials-for-logic directions.
items.summary_zh: 一项研究展示了在氢化硅表面进行原子级精确的碳结构机械合成，为碳基纳米材料与硅电子学的集成打开了新机会。这推动了纳米级制造的概念，未来可能对器件级应用产生影响。

items.title_en: Cate v1.0 is out: The Infinite canvas workspace for developers
items.title_zh: Cate 1.0 发布：面向开发者的无限画布工作区
items.summary_en: Cate 1.0 introduces an infinite canvas workspace tailored for developers to sketch, diagram, and prototype ideas alongside code, with collaborative features and workflow integrations.
items.summary_zh: Cate 1.0 发布，提供面向开发者的无限画布工作区，便于在代码、图示与原型之间自由工作，并具备协作与工作流集成。

items.title_en: Show HN: Atomic Editor – Obsidian-style live preview for CodeMirror 6
items.title_zh: Show HN：Atomic Editor—基于 CodeMirror 6 的 Obsidian 风格实时预览
items.summary_en: Show HN: Atomic Editor demonstrates an Obsidian-style live preview built on CodeMirror 6, offering a lightweight, integrated markdown preview for editors. It showcases how to combine rich preview rendering with a fast editing experience, useful for builders of knowledge-work apps.
items.summary_zh: Show HN: Atomic Editor 展示了在 CodeMirror 6 上实现的 Obsidian 风格实时预览，为编辑器提供轻量级的 Markdown 预览功能，兼顾快速编辑体验。它展示了将强大预览渲染与高效编辑融合的办法，对构建知识工作应用的开发者有参考价值。

items.title_en: A new register allocator for ZJIT
items.title_zh: ZJIT 的新寄存器分配器
items.summary_en: A new register allocator for ZJIT optimizes how variables map to CPU registers, reducing spills and improving generated code quality. The change can boost performance for hot code paths in JIT workloads. It demonstrates ongoing back-end work to make dynamic-language runtimes faster.
items.summary_zh: ZJIT 引入了一种新寄存器分配器，改善变量到处理器寄存器的映射，减少溢出并提升生成代码质量。此改动可能提升热点路径的执行性能，体现对 JIT 后端持续优化的趋势。

items.title_en: Why Ctrl+V won't paste images in Claude Code on WSL, with a fix
items.title_zh: 为什么在 WSL 的 Claude Code 中 Ctrl+V 贴不上图片，以及修复方法
items.summary_en: A practical debugging guide explaining why pasting images into a Windows Subsystem for Linux app fails—clipboard format and X/Wayland interoperability issues—and provides a working workaround (clipboard bridge or helper script) to transfer image data reliably. Useful for developers who run GUI Linux apps on WSL and need seamless clipboard support for screenshots and images.
items.summary_zh: 一篇实用指南解释了在 WSL 中将图片粘贴到应用失败的原因：剪贴板格式和 X/Wayland 互通问题，并给出了可行的修复（剪贴板桥接或辅助脚本）以可靠传输图像数据。对在 WSL 上运行 GUI Linux 应用并需要无缝剪贴板支持的开发者很有帮助。

items.title_en: Unix in East Germany (GDR) (1990)
items.title_zh: 1990 年的东德 Unix
items.summary_en: A look back at Unix adoption in East Germany around 1990, illustrating how scarcity, political context, and cross-border tech exchange shaped early computing culture in East Germany.
items.summary_zh: 回顾1990年前后东德地区对 Unix 的采用，展示了资源短缺、政治环境和跨境技术交流如何共同塑造了东德早期的计算机文化。

items.title_en: Ruby vs. Java vs. TypeScript: my experience on building a Cowork DOCX plugin
items.title_zh: Ruby 与 Java 与 TypeScript：我在构建 Cowork DOCX 插件中的经验
items.summary_en: A developer shares experiences choosing Ruby, Java, and TypeScript for building a collaborative DOCX plugin, weighing ecosystem maturity, deployment, and performance trade-offs. The post offers practical takeaways for choosing tech stacks in plugin development.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享在构建协作型 DOCX 插件时对 Ruby、Java 与 TypeScript 的选型体验，比较生态成熟度、部署与性能的权衡。为插件开发中的技术栈选择提供实用的参考。

items.title_en: What I've Learned (So Far) Building Online Mini Games with Elixir and Swift
items.title_zh: 我在用 Elixir 与 Swift 构建在线小游戏时学到的经验
items.summary_en: Shares practical lessons from building online mini games with Elixir on the back end and Swift on the client, covering concurrency, real-time features, and networking concerns. The author emphasizes architecture choices that balance responsiveness with maintainability.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享用 Elixir 构建在线小游戏后学到的经验，涵盖并发、实时特性与客户端-服务器架构的取舍。文章强调在可维护性与响应性之间取得平衡的重要性，以及在分层设计中的实际教训。

items.title_en: Amazon scraps AI leaderboard to stop workers chasing usage scores
items.title_zh: 亚马逊取消 AI 评分排行榜以阻止员工追逐使用分数
items.summary_en: Amazon scrapped its AI usage leaderboard to prevent workers from gaming the metrics and chasing high usage scores. The move highlights concerns about productivity surveillance and how incentives shape tool adoption.
items.summary_zh: 亚马逊取消了内部 AI 使用排行榜，避免员工为了提升分数而刷分。这反映出对基于 AI 的生产力追踪的担忧，以及对激励机制和工具采用方式的影响。

items.title_en: The Current Crisis: What's Happening to Science in America
items.title_zh: 当前危机：美国科学正在经历什么
items.summary_en: A Science Magazine blog outlines a growing crisis facing American science, including funding volatility, political influence, and talent flight. It emphasizes the consequences for innovation, national competitiveness, and public trust, and suggests focusing on basic research, diverse funding streams, and institutional resilience.
items.summary_zh: Science 杂志博客概述美国科学领域日益严峻的危机，涉及资金波动、政治影响和人才流失等问题。强调对创新、国家竞争力与公众信任的影响，并提出加强基础研究、多元化资助与机构韧性的建议。

items.title_en: Tunecat: Simple Internet Radio
items.title_zh: Tunecat：简易互联网广播
items.summary_en: Tunecat offers a lightweight, open-source internet radio solution focused on simplicity and reliability. It targets easy streaming and local network compatibility, appealing to hobbyists who want a clean, offline-friendly radio appliance.
items.summary_zh: Tunecat 提供一个简洁、开源的网络电台方案，强调易用性和稳定的流媒体体验，适合爱好者搭建个人广播设备。它面向跨设备播放和本地网络场景，追求低资源占用与简单配置。

items.title_en: Multimodal adaptive optical microscope: in vivo imaging, molecules to organisms
items.title_zh: 多模态自适应光学显微镜：在体成像从分子到有机体
items.summary_en: A multimodal adaptive optical microscope enables high-resolution in vivo imaging across scales, from molecules to whole organisms. This integration could transform live-cell biology, neuroscience, and developmental studies by linking molecular interactions to organismal context.
items.summary_zh: 该研究开发的多模态自适应光学显微镜实现了在体高分辨率成像，覆盖从分子到整个有机体的尺度。此技术整合有望将分子相互作用与生物体级别的上下文关联起来，推动生物学和神经科学等领域的发展。

items.title_en: Wterm – A terminal emulator for the web
items.title_zh: Wterm：一个网页端终端模拟器
items.summary_en: Wterm introduces a web-based terminal emulator that supports SSH-like sessions and collaboration in the browser, enabling easier remote development and shared terminals in cloud IDEs.
items.summary_zh: Wterm 提供了支持浏览器中 SSH 风格会话和协作的网页端终端模拟器，便于云端开发和共享终端的协作。

items.title_en: Notes about reading messages with the Python email packages
items.title_zh: 使用 Python 的 email 包读取邮件的笔记
items.summary_en: Practical notes on reading emails with Python's email package family, focusing on encoding, decoding, and parsing quirks. It covers RFC 5322 considerations, attachments handling, and tips for building reliable mail-processing tooling. A useful guide for real-world email parsing pitfalls.
items.summary_zh: 关于在 Python 中使用 email 包读取邮件的实用笔记，聚焦编码/解码和解析中的常见问题。涵盖 RFC 5322 的考量、附件处理，以及构建鲁棒邮件处理工具的要点，适合应对现实世界的邮件解析坑。

items.title_en: The History of "Prisencolinensinainciusol"
items.title_zh: Prisencolinensinainciusol 的历史
items.summary_en: An exploration of the history and cultural impact of Prisencolinensinainciusol, the famous playful Italian-sounding song, examining how language can transcend meaning to spark global curiosity.
items.summary_zh: 揭示Prisencolinensinainciusol 的历史与文化影响，这首以 invented 像意的意大利语风格著名歌曲，探讨语言如何超越意义，激发全球好奇心。

items.title_en: 90% of the T Distribution
items.title_zh: t 分布的 90% 区间
items.summary_en: Provides an intuitive take on the t distribution's 90% central region, examining how sample size and degrees of freedom affect interval interpretation in small-sample contexts.
items.summary_zh: 对 t 分布的 90% 置信区间提供直观解读，讨论样本大小与自由度如何影响小样本情境下的区间解释。

items.title_en: Durable execution, the hard way
items.title_zh: 持久执行：艰难之路
items.summary_en: A discussion of durable execution patterns in software, arguing that building reliable, fault-tolerant systems is hard but essential. It shares practical architectural tips and real-world lessons from implementing robust runtime behavior.
items.summary_zh: 对软件中持久执行模式的探讨，认为构建可靠、具容错能力的系统虽然艰难，但至关重要。给出实用的架构要点与在实现稳健运行时的真实经验。

items.title_en: Ahoy, DECmate II the little PDP-8 that could
items.title_zh: DECmate II：那个能干的 PDP-8
items.summary_en: DECmate II is a PDP-8-class microcomputer from DEC. The piece walks through restoration work, quirks of old hardware, and software challenges, illustrating why retrocomputing fans still care. It also highlights how these vintage systems helped shape early personal computing design and culture.
items.summary_zh: DECmate II 是 DEC 公司的一款基于 PDP-8 的微型计算机。 文章通过还原工作、硬件怪癖与软件挑战，展示了为什么退伍计算爱好者仍然热衷它，并强调这些老旧系统对早期个人计算机设计与文化的影响。

items.title_en: UA flight – 'turn Bluetooth off or we're turning around'
items.title_zh: UA 航班：'关掉蓝牙，否则我们返航'
items.summary_en: Describes an incident on a United Airlines flight where crew demanded passengers disable Bluetooth, illustrating in-flight device policy enforcement and the balance between safety and passenger experience.
items.summary_zh: 报道一次 UA 航班上乘客被要求关闭蓝牙的事件，揭示机上设备政策的执行难度与在安全、连通性与乘客体验之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Let's talk about EU Sovereignty (2025)
items.title_zh: 让我们谈谈欧盟的主权（2025）
items.summary_en: The piece analyzes the EU's sovereignty trajectory in 2025, focusing on digital autonomy, data governance, and dependency on foreign tech. It argues that Europe is balancing regulation, innovation, and strategic autonomy, with policy bets that could reshape tech supply chains and market dynamics.
items.summary_zh: 文章评估2025年欧盟主权的走向，聚焦数字自治、数据治理与对外部科技依赖。作者认为欧洲在监管、创新与战略自主之间寻求平衡，其政策选择可能重塑科技供应链与市场格局。

items.title_en: Multi-Agent LLM System for Automated Vulnerability Discovery and Reproduction
items.title_zh: 用于自动化漏洞发现与复现的多代理大模型系统
items.summary_en: An arXiv paper presents a multi-agent LLM system that automates vulnerability discovery and reproduction, documenting how cooperative AI agents can accelerate security research. The work highlights both the potential and the need for careful safety controls when automating offensive security tasks.
items.summary_zh: 一篇论文提出了一个多代理大模型系统，用于自动化发现与复现漏洞，展示了协作式 AI 代理如何加速安全研究。该研究同时提醒了在自动化对抗性安全任务中对安全与伦理控管的必要性。

items.title_en: More Whimsical OEIS Sequences
items.title_zh: 更多异想天开的 OEIS 数列
items.summary_en: A collection of playful and unexpected sequences added to the OEIS, highlighting how recreational math continues to surprise and delight enthusiasts. The post showcases examples and invites readers to explore patterns.
items.summary_zh: 一组有趣且出人意料的 OEIS 数列被收录，展示娱乐性数学如何继续带给爱好者惊喜。文中展示实例并邀请读者一起探索其中的模式。

items.title_en: Book Review: On the Calculation of Volume
items.title_zh: 书评：体积的计算
items.summary_en: Stephen Diehl's On the Calculation of Volume reviews a mathematical treatment of volume computation, weaving geometry with algorithmic thinking and offering insights relevant to developers and theoreticians.
items.summary_zh: Stephen Diehl 的《体积的计算》评述对体积计算的数学处理，结合几何与算法思维，为开发者和理论研究者提供有价值的见解。

items.title_en: Micropatching Brings the Abandoned Equation Editor Back to Life (2018)
items.title_zh: Micropatching：让被遗弃的方程编辑器重获新生（2018）
items.summary_en: The post illustrates tiny patches that revive a deprecated equation editor, demonstrating how micro-fixes can extend the life of legacy software and patch security holes without a full rewrite. It underscores practical, incremental maintenance as a viable strategy for aging tools.
items.summary_zh: 文章展示了通过微型补丁让一款被放弃的方程编辑器重新可用，证明小型修复也能延长旧软件的寿命并修补安全漏洞，而无需全面重写。强调了渐进式维护作为对抗 aging 工具的一种务实策略。

items.title_en: The physicists who convinced Fermilab to send Brazil's emails
items.title_zh: 那些说服费米实验室发送巴西电邮的物理学家们
items.summary_en: A human-interest tech history tale about physicists securing a long-running email channel between Brazil and Fermilab, highlighting how scientific collaboration often hinges on trust, persistence, and network-aware infrastructure. It reveals the social side of big science and the fragility of scholarly communication.
items.summary_zh: 一组物理学家说服费米实验室为巴西的电子邮件通信提供通道，揭示科学协作背后的耐心、信任与网络基础设施的重要性。故事体现了大科学的社会层面与脆弱的学术通信网络。

items.title_en: you_can::turn_off_the_borrow_checker
items.title_zh: you_can：关闭借用检查器
items.summary_en: A look at a Rust crate that allows turning off the borrow checker for advanced patterns, trading safety for flexibility. It emphasizes the risks and responsible use cases, along with alternatives that preserve safety.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一个可以关闭借用检查器的 Rust crate，强调在灵活性与安全性之间的权衡。提醒在提升自由度的同时要谨慎使用，并给出保持安全的替代思路。

items.title_en: Protestware for Coding Agents
items.title_zh: 为编码者设计的抗议软件
items.summary_en: It discusses how such actions can cause supply-chain risks and the need for safeguards and norms in OSS communities.
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨面向编码者的抗议软件及其道德风险，分析在代码生态中注入政治信息的利弊与潜在后果。讨论了此类行为对供应链安全的影响，以及开源社区在规范与防护方面的需求。

items.title_en: DeepSWE: A contamination-free benchmark for long-horizon coding agents
items.title_zh: DeepSWE：用于长期代码生成任务的无污染基准
items.summary_en: DeepSWE introduces a contamination-free benchmark for long-horizon coding agents, ensuring test data isn’t tainted by training data. This enables fairer evaluation of planning, memory, and multi-step reasoning in code-generation AI.
items.summary_zh: DeepSWE 提供一个无污染的基准，用于评估面向长期代码生成任务的模型，确保评测数据不被训练数据污染。该基准有助于更公平地衡量代码生成AI在规划、记忆和多步推理方面的表现。

items.title_en: Nvidia RTX Spark
items.title_zh: 英伟达 RTX Spark
items.summary_en: NVIDIA unveils RTX Spark, a platform to streamline real-time AI-accelerated graphics and design workflows on RTX GPUs. It emphasizes smoother toolchains, better integration with creator software, and potential boosts in throughput for rendering and AI tasks.
items.summary_zh: 英伟达推出 RTX Spark 平台，旨在提升 RTX GPU 上的实时 AI 加速图形与设计工作流的效率。它强调更顺畅的开发工具链、与创作者软件的深度整合，以及在渲染和 AI 任务中的潜在吞吐量提升。

items.title_en: Don't know where your data is from? Bayesian modeling for unknown coordinates
items.title_zh: 不知道数据来自何处？未知坐标的贝叶斯建模
items.summary_en: When data provenance is uncertain or coordinates are missing, Bayesian modeling can quantify uncertainty and help infer likely origins, enabling better data integration and bias assessment. The post outlines practical approaches and cautions.
items.summary_zh: 当数据来源不确定或坐标信息缺失时，贝叶斯建模可量化不确定性并推断可能的来源，帮助实现更可靠的数据整合与偏差评估。文中介绍了实用的方法与注意事项。

items.title_en: Ask HN: What Is the State of App Development in 2026?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：2026 年应用开发现状如何？
items.summary_en: The Ask HN thread surveys developers on the current state of app development in 2026, touching on frameworks, tooling, architecture, and AI-assisted coding. It highlights ongoing shifts toward cross-platform work, performance-focused UX, and cloud-native delivery.
items.summary_zh: Ask HN 讨论串聚焦 2026 年应用开发的现状，涉及框架、工具链、架构及 AI 辅助编码等主题。揭示向跨平台、注重性能的用户体验，以及云原生部署的趋势。

items.title_en: Boston and Bermuda
items.title_zh: 波士顿与百慕大
items.summary_en: A travel-focused deep dive into the Boston–Bermuda corridor, exploring flight options, time zones, and maritime routes—or the quirks of travel between these two hubs. The piece offers practical tips and observations for curious travelers.
items.summary_zh: 深入探讨波士顿与百慕大之间的旅程，涵盖航线选择、时区差异与海上交通等要点，并分享对这两地往返旅行的实用建议和观察。

items.title_en: Show HN: Open Envelope – an open schema for defining AI agent teams
items.title_zh: Open Envelope：定义 AI 代理团队的开放模式
items.summary_en: Open Envelope proposes a schema for composing AI agent teams, aiming to standardize roles, responsibilities, and interaction patterns across AI systems. The project offers a practical framework for building collaborative AI workflows and governance.
items.summary_zh: Open Envelope 提出一个用于定义 AI 代理团队的开放架构，力求标准化团队角色、职责与交互模式，促进跨系统协作。该框架为构建协作型 AI 流程与治理提供了可落地的方法。

items.title_en: Exposing Critical Vulnerabilities in CBSE's On-Screen Marking Portal
items.title_zh: 揭露 CBSE 在线阅卷门户的关键漏洞
items.summary_en: Researchers reveal critical vulnerabilities in CBSE's online marking portal, exposing risks to exam integrity and candidate data; the findings urge rapid remediation and stronger authentication.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员揭露 CBSE 在线阅卷门户的关键漏洞，威胁考试公正与考生数据安全；呼吁尽快修复并加强认证与访问控制。

items.title_en: In-Browser Container Builds
items.title_zh: 浏览器内的容器构建
items.summary_en: Shows how fully in-browser container builds work, leveraging WebAssembly and browser sandboxing to run isolated environments without relying on remote servers. This approach can boost reproducibility, privacy, and offline workflows for developers and researchers.
items.summary_zh: 展示了在浏览器内进行完全容器构建的方式，利用 WebAssembly 与浏览器沙箱在不依赖远程服务器的情况下运行隔离环境。此做法提升可复现性、隐私和离线工作流的可行性，适合开发者与研究人员。

items.title_en: Notes on Pope Leo XIV's Encyclical on AI
items.title_zh: 关于 AI 的教皇利奥十四世通谕的笔记
items.summary_en: An imagined papal encyclical on AI examines ethics, governance, and the social impact of automation. It prompts designers and policymakers to consider accountability, transparency, and how AI aligns with human flourishing.
items.summary_zh: 以虚构的教皇通谕为线索，探讨 AI 的伦理、治理与自动化的社会影响，促使设计师与决策者思考问责、透明度以及 AI 与人类福祉的对齐。

items.title_en: Floor and Ceil versus Denormals on CPU and GPU
items.title_zh: CPU 与 GPU 上的 floor/ceil 与 denormals 的对比分析
items.summary_en: A technical comparison of floor/ceil operations versus denormals on CPU and GPU, highlighting performance and precision tradeoffs for numeric workloads and graphics.
items.summary_zh: 对 CPU 与 GPU 上的 floor/ceil 运算与 denormals 的对比，聚焦数值计算与图形工作负载下的性能与精度权衡。

items.title_en: Microsoft's stance on zero day exploits is a dumpster fire of their own making
items.title_zh: 微软对零日漏洞的立场自作自受
items.summary_en: Critiques Microsoft's stance on zero-day exploits, arguing it discourages timely patching and transparency, which undermines overall security. The piece calls for clearer vulnerability disclosure and responsible security policy.
items.summary_zh: 批评微软对零日漏洞的立场，认为这会阻碍及时修补和透明度，削弱整体安全性。呼吁对漏洞披露和安全政策采取更清晰、负责任的态度。

items.title_en: CPPL: A Circuit Prompt Programming Language
items.title_zh: CPPL：电路提示编程语言
items.summary_en: CPPL proposes circuit-level programming via prompts, blending hardware design with natural-language style prompts to control circuits. The paper aims to make hardware programming more accessible and accelerate exploration of programmable logic.
items.summary_zh: CPPL 提出一种面向电路的提示式编程语言，将硬件设计与自然语言风格的提示结合，旨在让电路控制更易上手。该论文希望简化硬件编程流程，促进可编程逻辑的探索。

items.title_en: The Lottery – Shirley Jackson (1948)
items.title_zh: 彩票
items.summary_en: The Lottery is a chilling story about conformity and ritual in a small town; Shirley Jackson uses a veneer of normalcy to expose mob mentality and scapegoating.
items.summary_zh: 《彩票》以小镇的表面正常与仪式化的集体暴行为线索，揭示群体思维与替罪羊现象的可怕后果。

items.title_en: Why Do We Sleep Under Blankets, Even on the Hottest Nights? (2017)
items.title_zh: 为什么在最热的夜晚也要盖毯子睡觉？（2017）
items.summary_en: This Atlas Obscura piece explores why people still sleep with blankets in hot weather, touching on thermoregulation, comfort, and cultural habits. It explains how blankets create microclimates that ease sleep onset and help with temperature regulation even when ambient heat is high. The piece links simple comfort to sleep quality.
items.summary_zh: 本文解读为何在炎热天气下人们仍然盖毯睡觉，涉及体温调节、舒适感与文化习惯。阐释毯子如何创造微气候，帮助入睡并辅助体温调节，即使外界温度很高也能提高睡眠质量。

items.title_en: Rotary GPU: Exploring Local Execution for Large MoE Models Under Limited VRAM
items.title_zh: Rotary GPU：在显存受限下对大型 MoE 模型的本地执行
items.summary_en: Presents Rotary GPU, a local-execution approach for running large Mixture-of-Experts models under limited VRAM, detailing memory management, partitioning, and potential inference gains in constrained environments.
items.summary_zh: 提出 Rotary GPU，在显存受限的环境中实现对大型 MoE 模型的本地执行。介绍内存管理、模型分区等策略，以及在资源有限场景下提升推理可行性的潜在收益。

items.title_en: Free full BGP feed. IPv4 and IPv6 (2020)
items.title_zh: 免费的完整 BGP 数据源（IPv4 与 IPv6，2020 年）
items.summary_en: A freely available, full BGP feed from 2020 covers both IPv4 and IPv6, enabling researchers to study routing announcements and potential misconfigurations. This resource lowers the barrier for researchers and hobbyists to analyze global interdomain routing patterns.
items.summary_zh: 一个免费的完整 BGP 数据源（包含 IPv4/IPv6，2020 年版本），便于研究路由公告和潜在的配置错误。该资源降低了研究者和爱好者分析全球互联路由模式的门槛。

items.title_en: Stateless Actors
items.title_zh: 无状态的 Actor 模型
items.summary_en: A discussion of stateless actors in distributed systems, arguing that pushing state into external stores can improve fault tolerance and scalability. The piece contrasts this with traditional actor-model designs that rely on in-memory state.
items.summary_zh: 讨论分布式系统中的无状态 Actors，主张将状态外置以提升容错与可伸缩性。文中对比了无状态设计与传统依赖内存状态的 actor 模型优劣。

items.title_en: Chibil: A C compiler targeting .NET IL
items.title_zh: Chibil：面向 .NET IL 的 C 编译器
items.summary_en: Chibil is a C compiler that targets .NET Intermediate Language, enabling C programs to run on the CLR. This bridges ecosystems and invites performance and interoperability trade-offs that interest systems programmers.
items.summary_zh: Chibil 是一个将 C 编译成 .NET IL 的编译器，使 C 程序能在 CLR 上运行，连接了两个生态系统，同时带来性能和互操作性的权衡。

items.title_en: 86Box v6.0
items.title_zh: 86Box v6.0
items.summary_en: 86Box v6.0 is a PC emulator release expanding machine definitions, improving accuracy, and boosting DOS-era software compatibility. It remains a favorite for retro computing enthusiasts.
items.summary_zh: 86Box v6.0 是 PC 仿真器的新版本，扩充了机型定义、提升了仿真精度，并增强对 DOS 时代软件的兼容性。 它继续成为复古计算爱好者的热门工具。

items.title_en: Phloto for My Photo Flow
items.title_zh: Phloto：为 My Photo Flow 的解决方案
items.summary_en: This piece introduces Phloto as a tool for My Photo Flow, outlining its role in the photography workflow and how it improves organization, tagging, or processing steps.
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍 Phloto 这一工具在 My Photo Flow 工作流中的作用，阐述它如何帮助整理、标注或处理照片等环节。

items.title_en: The people who actually want AI to replace humanity
items.title_zh: 真正想让 AI 替代人类的人
items.summary_en: Vox surveys people who want AI to replace humanity, exploring successionist and transhumanist ideas. It unpacks motivations, rhetoric, and potential risks of treating AI as humanity's successor, and the political and social implications of such beliefs.
items.summary_zh: 这篇 Vox 文章探讨那些希望 AI 替代人类的人群，深入解读“继承主义”等思潮及后人类主义的观点。文章分析了背后的动机、论述方式以及将 AI 视为人类接班者的潜在风险及社会政治影响。

items.title_en: Gustav Klimt and Egon Schiele in Conversation (2018)
items.title_zh: 克里姆特与席勒的对话（2018）
items.summary_en: Explores the dialogue between Klimt and Schiele through their drawings, highlighting stylistic contrasts, mutual influence, and the evolution of modern Austrian art.
items.summary_zh: 通过两位大师的素描作品，揭示克里姆特与席勒之间的对话、风格差异及相互影响，呈现奥地利现代艺术的发展脉络。

items.title_en: Testing the WWI concrete ships and WWII concrete barges
items.title_zh: 测试一战混凝土舰船和二战混凝土驳船
items.summary_en: Testing WWI concrete ships and WWII concrete barges reveals how archival hull designs perform in modern tests, informing materials science and naval architecture debates around experimental use of concrete in ships.
items.summary_zh: 对一战混凝土舰船与二战混凝土驳船的现代测试显示，这些历史性船体在当代评估中的表现，为材料科学与舰船设计关于混凝土在海上应用的讨论提供证据。

items.title_en: Sweden becomes a smoke-free country
items.title_zh: 瑞典成为无烟国家
items.summary_en: Sweden's milestone to become smoke-free marks progress in public health policy; however, nicotine alternatives and enforcement will shape the outcome.
items.summary_zh: 瑞典实现无烟国家的里程碑，显示公共卫生政策的显著进展；未来将由尼古丁替代品的使用和执行力度等因素决定成效。

items.title_en: Step 3.7 Flash
items.title_zh: Step 3.7 Flash 更新
items.summary_en: Step 3.7 Flash introduces new features and performance improvements, highlighting faster workflows and smoother tooling within the Step ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Step 3.7 Flash 带来新功能和性能改进，强调在 Step 生态中的更快工作流和更顺畅的工具链。

items.title_en: AI grifters are creating fake Black people to sell Shein junk
items.title_zh: AI 骗子在 Shein 上用假黑人形象销售商品
items.summary_en: Covers the use of AI-generated personas depicting Black people to market Shein products, highlighting ethical concerns, misrepresentation, and the need for platform safeguards against deepfakes and biased marketing.
items.summary_zh: 报道使用 AI 生成的假黑人形象在 Shein 平台上销售商品的现象，暴露真实性、误导与算法偏见等问题，并呼吁加强平台防护与道德规范。

items.title_en: Zig 2026: No-AI Policy, $670K Foundation, Left GitHub and Why Zig Isn't 1.0 [video]
items.title_zh: Zig 2026：禁用 AI、67 万美元基金会、退出 GitHub 与为何还未 1.0【视频】
items.summary_en: A developer update outlines Zig project's 2026 choices: an explicit no-AI policy for contributions, a $670K foundation fund to support development, moving away from GitHub hosting, and reasons the language hasn't reached 1.0 yet (stability, API decisions and ecosystem maturity). The segment highlights governance, funding and independence as focal concerns for language sustainability.
items.summary_zh: 一段开发者更新说明了 Zig 项目 2026 年的决策：对贡献实行明确的禁用 AI 政策、成立 67 万美元的基金支持开发、脱离 GitHub 托管，以及尚未达成 1.0 的原因（稳定性、API 抉择与生态成熟度）。视频凸显治理、资金与独立性是语言可持续发展的核心问题。

items.title_en: Adding Linux support back for the BASIC (free) version of Vivado
items.title_zh: Vivado 免费版重新获得 Linux 支持
items.summary_en: Linux support is being added back to the BASIC (free) version of Vivado, enabling hobbyists and small teams to use the FPGA design suite on Linux again.
items.summary_zh: Vivado 的 BASIC（免费）版本重新加入 Linux 支持，使爱好者与小型团队能够在 Linux 上继续使用这款 FPGA 设计工具。

items.title_en: A Comma and a Question Mark, Redux: Quick Terminal Helpers Using Pi
items.title_zh: 逗号与问号，Redux：使用 Pi 的快速终端助手
items.summary_en: A playful article presents small terminal utilities built around Pi and punctuation to speed up shell work. It shows how tiny, well-designed tools can boost daily productivity and encourage developers to rethink command-line ergonomics. The takeaway is the value of small, composable tools.
items.summary_zh: 一篇富有趣味的文章展示了基于 Pi 与标点符号的简小终端工具，用于加速日常命令行工作。它说明了微小且设计良好的工具如何提升日常生产力，并促使开发者重新思考命令行的符合性与可组合性。

items.title_en: The Internet Has Become Too American to Trust
items.title_zh: 互联网已经过于美国化，信任堪忧
items.summary_en: Argues that the Internet's governance has grown overly dominated by American interests, diminishing global trust.
items.summary_zh: 认为互联网治理日益被美国利益主导，削弱全球信任。文章讨论隐私、数据主权与跨境协作的影响。

items.title_en: He Lost It at the Movies
items.title_zh: 他在电影院里失控的故事
items.summary_en: A reflective slice-of-life piece using a cinema outing to probe how attention, expectation, and memory shape our daily identities.
items.summary_zh: 该文通过一次看电影的经历，探讨注意力、期望与记忆如何在日常生活中塑造自我。

items.title_en: Meta is reportedly developing an AI pendant
items.title_zh: 据称 Meta 正在开发一款 AI 吊坠
items.summary_en: Meta reportedly developing an AI pendant, presumably a wearable device with on-device inference and privacy-preserving features, signaling ongoing convergence of AI assistants into always-on wearables. It could push new norms around audio-visual sensing and edge AI.
items.summary_zh: 据称 Meta 正在开发一款 AI 吊坠式可穿戴设备，预计具备本地推理与隐私保护特性。该动向体现了 AI 助手向可穿戴形态演进的趋势及对数据与传感的影响。

items.title_en: Tsplat – Run Gaussian splatting in your terminal
items.title_zh: Tsplat：在终端中运行高斯点绘制
items.summary_en: Tsplat brings real-time Gaussian splatting visualization to the command line, enabling lightweight 3D rendering directly in terminals. It demonstrates how clever rendering tricks can unlock exploration on low-power or serverless environments.
items.summary_zh: Tsplat 将实时高斯点绘制的可视化带到命令行，能够在终端直接进行轻量级的 3D 渲染。此举展示了在低功耗或无服务器环境中，通过巧妙的渲染技巧实现图形探索的可能性。

items.title_en: AI Datacenters Were Built for GPUs. What Happens When You Remove the GPUs?
items.title_zh: AI 数据中心：移除 GPU 后会如何
items.summary_en: GPU-centric AI data centers are being challenged as researchers explore CPU-first and alternative accelerators. Removing GPUs prompts questions about performance, cost, and software stack implications for AI workloads in cloud environments.
items.summary_zh: 以GPU为核心的AI数据中心正面临挑战，研究者开始探索先用CPU或其他加速器的方案。移除GPU会引发关于在云环境中AI工作负载的性能、成本与软件栈影响的讨论。

items.title_en: Freediving, Embodiment and Humanity
items.title_zh: 自由潜水、具身性与人性：Joanna Rutkowska
items.summary_en: Profiling Joanna Rutkowska's insights on freediving, embodiment, and humanity, tying extreme discipline to cybersecurity philosophy and human-centric tech design.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦 Joanna Rutkowska 对自由潜水、具身性与人性的洞察，将极端训练与网络安全哲学、以人为本的科技设计联系起来。

items.title_en: The Secret Garden of Rock-Paper-Scissors
items.title_zh: 石头剪刀布的秘密花园
items.summary_en: A playful dive into Rock-Paper-Scissors that uncovers hidden patterns and strategic insights, illustrating how even simple games reveal rich dynamics of competition and adaptation.
items.summary_zh: 对石头剪刀布进行趣味性剖析，揭示隐藏的模式与策略洞察，展示简单游戏背后其实包含着丰富的竞争与适应性动态。

items.title_en: New solar desalination breakthrough makes fresh water without toxic brine
items.title_zh: 太阳能淡化新突破：不产生有毒盐水的淡水生产
items.summary_en: A solar desalination breakthrough enables fresh water production with no toxic brine discharge. If scalable, it could transform water supply in arid regions while reducing environmental impact.
items.summary_zh: 太阳能淡化方面的新突破实现了无有毒盐水排放的淡水生产。若能规模化，将有望改变干旱地区的水资源供应并降低环境影响。

items.title_en: Libwce: The entropy layer of a wavelet codec, on its own
items.title_zh: Libwce：小波编码的熵层独立实现
items.summary_en: Libwce presents the entropy layer of a wavelet codec as a standalone library, enabling researchers to experiment with compression techniques in isolation. This mirrors a growing trend toward modular, reusable building blocks in signal processing.
items.summary_zh: Libwce 将小波编码中的熵层独立成一个库，便于研究者在分离环境下试验压缩算法。体现了将信号处理模块化、可复用化的趋势。

items.title_en: Stockholm poised to become leading European geospatial intel player
items.title_zh: 斯德哥尔摩有望成为欧洲地理空间情报领域的领先者
items.summary_en: Stockholm is emerging as a hub for geospatial intelligence, with startups and public-private initiatives accelerating mapping analytics, satellite data processing, and location-based services across Europe.
items.summary_zh: 斯德哥尔摩正崛起为欧洲地理空间情报中心，初创企业与公私合营项目共同推动制图分析、卫星数据处理和基于位置的服务的发展。

items.title_en: Finding Miscompiles for Fun, Not Profit
items.title_zh: 为乐趣寻找误编译，而非盈利
items.summary_en: A project exploring compiler miscompiles for educational purposes, highlighting vulnerabilities and edge cases in optimization pipelines. The work underscores the value of curiosity-driven research in understanding compiler behavior.
items.summary_zh: 该工作围绕出于教育目的寻找编译器误编译，揭示优化管线中的漏洞与边界情况。强调好奇心驱动研究在理解编译器行为中的价值。

items.title_en: Mysteries of the Griffin iMate
items.title_zh: Griffin iMate 的神秘之处
items.summary_en: Mysteries of the Griffin iMate dives into the obscure Griffin iMate hardware, collecting clues, prototypes, and community theories to puzzle out its purpose and why it remains enigmatic.
items.summary_zh: 《 Griffin iMate 的神秘之处》对 Griffin iMate 这一神秘硬件进行探究，收集线索、原型与社区推测，试图拼凑其用途与命运。

items.title_en: Real wages start to shrink in developed countries
items.title_zh: 发达国家实工资开始下降
items.summary_en: Real wages are shrinking in developed economies as price growth outpaces nominal pay hikes. The trend may dampen consumer spending and influence policy debates on inflation, productivity, and dependence on tech-enabled productivity gains.
items.summary_zh: 发达国家的实际工资正在下降，工资增长跟不上价格上涨。此趋势可能压制消费支出，并在通胀、生产率以及对科技生产力提升的依赖等议题上引发政策讨论。

items.title_en: Riscrithm – An intuitive RISC-V assembler and optimizer coded in Go
items.title_zh: Riscrithm：Go实现的RISC-V汇编器与优化器
items.summary_en: Riscrithm is an intuitive RISC-V assembler and optimizer coded in Go, easing the process of building and optimizing RISC-V binaries. It exemplifies the growing tooling ecosystem around the open ISA and showcases Go's viability for systems programming.
items.summary_zh: Riscrithm 是用 Go 编写的直观 RISC-V 汇编器与优化器，简化了 RISC‑V 二进制的构建与优化过程。它体现了围绕开源指令集的工具生态在壮大，也展示了 Go 在系统编程工具中的应用潜力。

items.title_en: The Skeuomorphism Nobody Talks About [video]
items.title_zh: 无人谈论的拟物化[视频]
items.summary_en: The Skeuomorphism Nobody Talks About [video] dives into lesser-known skeuomorphic design elements and why they persist in interfaces and devices.
items.summary_zh: 视频剖析那些鲜为人知的拟物化设计元素及其在界面和设备中的持续存在原因。

items.title_en: ATLAS: Autoformalized Textbook Library At Scale
items.title_zh: ATLAS：大规模自动形式化教科书库
items.summary_en: ATLAS scales autoformalization of textbook content, turning academic text into machine-readable formal representations. This enables formal verification, reasoning, and improved interoperability in education and research.
items.summary_zh: ATLAS 将教科书内容自动形式化规模化，将学术文本转换为可被机器读取的形式化表示，从而支持形式化验证、推理和教育科研中的互操作性提升。

items.title_en: Using safe-area-inset to build mobile-safe layouts
items.title_zh: 使用 safe-area-inset 构建移动端安全布局
items.summary_en: A practical guide on using CSS safe-area-inset to build mobile-safe layouts that respect notches, rounded corners, and home indicators across devices. Includes tips for consistent padding, testing, and responsive design.
items.summary_zh: 介绍如何在移动端布局中使用 CSS 的 safe-area-inset，确保在不同设备的刘海、圆角和导航栏处保持可读性和可用性。提供一致的内距、测试和响应式设计的实用要点。

items.title_en: AI will be used to estimate age of asylum seekers from next year
items.title_zh: AI 将用于来年估算庇难申请者的年龄
items.summary_en: Policy discussions reveal AI-assisted age estimation for asylum seekers may begin next year, prompting concerns about accuracy, bias, and due-process implications in immigration.
items.summary_zh: 政策讨论显示，AI 辅助的庇难申请者年龄估算可能从明年开始，引发关于准确性、偏见以及移民程序正当性等问题的担忧。

items.title_en: Even (very) noisy LLM evaluators are useful for improving AI agents
items.title_zh: 即使是非常嘈杂的LLM评估器也有助于改进AI代理
items.summary_en: Argues that even noisy language-model evaluators can contribute useful signals for improving AI agents, highlighting resilience to noisy feedback and the practicality of weak supervision.
items.summary_zh: 认为即使是噪声较多的LLM评估信号也能为改进AI代理提供有效线索，凸显对嘈杂反馈的鲁棒性和弱监督的实用性。

items.title_en: Inkstravaganza
items.title_zh: Inkstravaganza（墨迹狂欢）
items.summary_en: Inkstravaganza is a newsletter from Ink & Switch that showcases design experiments, thoughts on interaction, and ideas about making complex systems more usable. It collects short pieces, sketches, and reflections on how to craft tangible, humane tech.
items.summary_zh: Inkstravaganza 是 Ink & Switch 的一份时事通讯，汇集设计实验、交互思考与让复杂系统更易用的创意。内容包含简短文章、草图与对打造更具人性化的科技体验的反思。

items.title_en: Why is Europe the fastest warming continent?
items.title_zh: 为什么欧洲是全球增温最快的大陆？
items.summary_en: New analyses indicate Europe is warming faster than the global average due to regional feedbacks and escalating heat events.
items.summary_zh: 新的分析显示欧洲的变暖速度高于全球平均水平，原因在于区域性反馈和日益增多的热事件。文章探讨对基础设施、农业与能源政策的影响，强调区域气候行动的重要性。

items.title_en: Maia-3: free and open source
items.title_zh: Maia-3：开源免费
items.summary_en: Maia-3 is free and open source, expanding access to an AI or chess tool for the community to collaborate and improve.
items.summary_zh: Maia-3 免费且开源，为社区提供协作改进的 AI/棋类工具。

items.title_en: Blind Waymo Users Revel in the Joy of Riding Alone
items.title_zh: 盲人乘客在 Waymo 自动驾驶出租车独自出行的喜悦
items.summary_en: The New York Times story follows blind Waymo riders who value autonomous rides for independence and privacy, with broader reflections on accessibility and safety in autonomous mobility. It highlights real-world impact and the potential of self-driving tech to empower people with visual impairments.
items.summary_zh: 文章聚焦依赖 Waymo 自动驾驶出租车的盲人乘客，体验独立、无需牵引的出行乐趣。讨论无障碍性、安全性以及自动驾驶出行对视障人士日常生活的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Mathematical Patterns in African American HAIRSTYLEs
items.title_zh: 非裔美国人发型中的数学模式
items.summary_en: Mathematical Patterns in African American Hairstyles shows geometry and symmetry in everyday styling, turning a cultural art form into math-friendly insight.
items.summary_zh: 从非裔美国人发型中发现的数学模式揭示几何与对称在日常美学中的应用，为科普与美学提供链接。

items.title_en: US troops are reportedly being targeted using location data, Pentagon says
items.title_zh: 据称美军部队被定位数据定位目标，五角大楼表示
items.summary_en: The Pentagon confirms that adversaries are reportedly targeting US troops using location data, highlighting privacy and operational security risks from open data and personal devices. The report underscores the need for safeguards and updated defense practices.
items.summary_zh: 五角大楼证实对手据称利用位置信息对美军部队实施打击，暴露来自公开数据和个人设备的定位隐患。此事凸显对策与防护实践更新的迫切性。

items.title_en: Unlawful by design: Exposing the human rights costs of generative AI
items.title_zh: 设计中的违法之处：揭示生成式 AI 的人权成本
items.summary_en: Amnesty International argues that generative AI systems embed and amplify human rights harms—from mis/disinformation and labor issues to bias and surveillance. The report calls for stronger safeguards, transparency, and accountability in AI development and deployment.
items.summary_zh: 大赦国际指出生成式 AI 系统加剧并放大人权受害风险，涵盖误导信息、劳工问题、偏见与监控等方面。报告呼吁在 AI 的开发与部署中加强监管、透明度与问责机制。

items.title_en: Talk Is Cheap: The Operational Impact of LLM Use
items.title_zh: 说起来容易：LLM 使用对运营的实际影响
items.summary_en: LLM usage shifts operations, enabling automation but requiring governance to manage risk, bias, and reliability. The piece argues that real ROI comes from disciplined processes, not mere exposure to models.
items.summary_zh: LLM 的使用正在改变运营模式，带来自动化潜力，同时也需要治理来应对风险、偏见和可靠性等问题。文章强调，真正的回报来自于有章法的流程管理，而非仅仅使用模型。

items.title_en: Micromania: The Whole Truth about Home Computers (1984)
items.title_zh: 微型热潮：1984 年家庭电脑的真相
items.summary_en: A look at the 1984 era of home computers, challenging myths of the consumer boom and revealing the tangled ecosystem of peripherals, software, and user communities. It illuminates how early decisions shaped modern personal computing and hardware/software ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 这篇回顾聚焦1984年的家庭计算机时代，揭示消费热潮背后的实际情况，以及外设、软件和用户社区等要素的错综关系。文章指出早期决策如何塑造了如今的个人计算机生态与硬件/软件的协同发展。

items.title_en: Liverpool and Manchester Railway
items.title_zh: 利物浦与曼彻斯特铁路
items.summary_en: An overview of the Liverpool and Manchester Railway, the first paid-passenger railway to rely on steam power, and its enduring impact on transport, industry, and standardization of rail gauges.
items.summary_zh: 利物浦—曼彻斯特铁路是世界上第一条以蒸汽动力运转的客运铁路，深刻影响了交通、工业与铁路标准化的进程。

items.title_en: Finding success in industry as a chip designer
items.title_zh: 在芯片设计行业取得成功
items.summary_en: The piece contrasts academic paths vs industry for chip designers, emphasizing practical engineering experience, fab collaboration, and end-to-end system thinking. It offers career strategies for researchers aiming to transition into impactful hardware roles.
items.summary_zh: 文章对比了学术路径与业界在芯片设计中的发展，强调实践工程经验、与晶圆厂的协作以及端到端的系统思维的重要性。为希望进入有影响力的硬件岗位的研究人员提供了职业策略。

items.title_en: A Comma and a Question Mark
items.title_zh: 一个逗号和一个问号
items.summary_en: A concise reflection on punctuation's power to shape meaning and reader interpretation. It argues for disciplined use of commas and question marks to prevent ambiguity and guide reader thought.
items.summary_zh: 简短反思标点对意义和读者解读的影响，强调在逗号和问号的使用上保持克制，以避免歧义并引导读者的思考。

items.title_en: Uber blows through its AI budget in 1 quarter
items.title_zh: 优步一季度就把AI预算耗尽
items.summary_en: Uber’s AI-related spend surged in a single quarter, driven by large-scale token usage and deployments of capabilities like Claude and code assistants. The pace signals a bold AI-fuelled push across products, raising questions about ROI and burn rate as the company bets on AI to transform rider and driver experiences.
items.summary_zh: 在一个季度内，优步在人工智能相关支出大幅上升，涉及大量令牌消耗和对 Claude、代码助手等工具的部署。这样的投入速度显示出公司正在以AI为驱动推动产品创新，但也引发对投资回报与烧钱速度的担忧，以及对提升乘客和司机体验的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Remove all LLM generated commits before people get hurt by this nonsense
items.title_zh: 在提交历史中移除所有 LLM 生成的提交
items.summary_en: A GitHub issue calls for removing all AI-generated commits to prevent polluting history and misleading diffs. It highlights governance needs around machine-generated code and tooling safeguards.
items.summary_zh: 一则 GitHub 问题呼吁移除所有由大语言模型生成的提交，以避免污染提交历史与误导性差异。凸显对机器生成代码的治理需求与工具安全性。

items.title_en: An Elephant Who Demonstrated That Her Species Might Be Self-Aware, Dies at 55
items.title_zh: 一头可能具备自我意识的象去世，享年55岁
items.summary_en: An Asian elephant named Happy showed signs of self awareness and died at 55.
items.summary_zh: 一头名为 Happy 的亚洲象在布朗克斯动物园去世，享年55岁，曾被认为可能具备自我意识。 这一案例为 elephants 自我意识的研究提供了重要证据，也提醒人们关注动物认知研究的重要性。

items.title_en: Karpathy LLM Wiki pattern integrated into Obsidian agenic workflow
items.title_zh: 将 Karpathy 的 LLM Wiki 模式整合进 Obsidian 的工作流
items.summary_en: Describes integrating the Karpathy-style LLM wiki pattern into an Obsidian knowledge workflow, enabling a scalable, interconnected note graph for AI research and development. The approach helps organize ideas, prompts, and references in a navigable system.
items.summary_zh: 介绍将 Karpathy 风格的 LLM Wiki 模式整合进 Obsidian 的知识工作流，打造可扩展、互联的笔记图，支持 AI 研究与开发。该方法有助于把想法、提示和参考文献整理成一个易于导航的系统。

items.title_en: The Genius of the Barn Owl's Feathers
items.title_zh: 猫头鹰羽毛的巧妙之处
items.summary_en: Barn owl feathers conceal microstructures that cancel noise as air flows through and around the wing, enabling near-silent flight. The piece links this natural ingenuity to biomimetic research aimed at quieter drones, wind turbines, and acoustic materials.
items.summary_zh: 猫头鹰羽毛的微观结构能抑制空气中的涡流和噪音，从而实现接近无声的飞行。文章将这一自然智慧与仿生研究联系起来，展示在无人机、风力发电机和声学材料领域的应用潜力。

items.title_en: Avoiding Death on the Yellow Brick Road
items.title_zh: 黄砖路上的生存之道：规避致命风险
items.summary_en: A thoughtful piece on navigating AI-driven startups, focusing on avoiding common fatal missteps along the journey. It emphasizes pragmatic risk management, customer focus, and sustaining velocity without compromising quality.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨在 AI 驱动的创业环境中如何规避常见致命错误，强调务实的风险管理、以客户为中心以及在保持速度的同时保障质量。

items.title_en: Rubin Tracks Skyscraper-Size Asteroids and Failed Supernovas
items.title_zh: Rubin 追踪摩天级小行星、失败的超新星与星际来客
items.summary_en: An in-depth look at Rubin's work mapping colossal solar system bodies, failed supernovae, and mysterious interstellar visitors. The feature underscores how large-scale surveys and careful data interpretation drive new insights and push telescope design.
items.summary_zh: 深入介绍 Rubin 在追踪巨型小行星、坍缩失败的超新星以及星际来客方面的研究。该报道凸显大规模观测和谨慎的数据解读如何带来新发现，并推动望远镜与观测策略的改进。
